name: B1
description: Intermediate — Everyday topics and familiar situations

words.definition: A job that requires special education and training.
words.definitionUz: Profession — maxsus ta’lim va tayyorgarlik talab qiladigan kasb.
words.example1: Teaching is a noble profession.
words.example3: She chose medicine as her profession.
extraExamples: He wants to enter the legal profession.
The profession requires years of study.
She is happy with her profession.
It is important to love your profession.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu kasb ko‘p yillik o‘qishni talab qiladi.

words.definition: An official record of education or skills.
words.definitionUz: Qualification — ta’lim yoki ko‘nikmalarni tasdiqlovchi rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: She has good qualifications for the job.
words.example1Translation: U ish uchun yaxshi malakaga ega.
words.example3: He needs more qualifications to get promoted.
words.example3Translation: U ko‘tarilish uchun ko‘proq malaka kerak.
extraExamples: A university degree is a qualification.
She gained new qualifications last year.
He listed his qualifications on the resume.
Qualifications are important for career growth.
She is studying for a teaching qualification.
Lack of qualifications can be a problem.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘tgan yili yangi malakalar oldi.
U o‘qituvchilik malakasini olish uchun o‘qiydi.

words.definition: Moving to a higher position at work.
words.definitionUz: Promotion — ishda yuqori lavozimga ko‘tarilish.
words.example1: She got a promotion last month.
words.example2: Hard work can lead to promotion.
words.example3: The promotion comes with more responsibility.
words.example3Translation: Ko‘tarilish ko‘proq mas’uliyat bilan birga keladi.
extraExamples: He is hoping for a promotion soon.
I didn't get the promotion this time.
extraExampleTranslations: U yaqin orada ko‘tarilishni umid qilmoqda.

words.definition: Money paid for work, usually weekly.
words.definitionUz: Wage — ish uchun to‘lanadigan pul, odatda haftalik.
words.example1: The workers receive a good wage.
words.example2: Minimum wage is increasing this year.
words.example2Translation: Minimal ish haqi bu yil oshmoqda.
words.example3Translation: U past ish haqi bilan ishlaydi.
extraExamples: Daily wages are paid every evening.
extraExampleTranslations: Kunlik ish haqi har oqshom to‘lanadi.
Ish haqining oshishi ishchilarga yordam beradi.
Ular yuqoriroq ish haqi bo‘yicha muzokara qilishadi.

words.definition: Extra money paid as a reward for good work.
words.definitionUz: Bonus — yaxshi ish uchun qo‘shimcha to‘lanadigan pul mukofoti.
words.example1: The company gave everyone a Christmas bonus.
words.example2: She received a big bonus this year.
words.example2Translation: U bu yili katta bonus oldi.
extraExamples: He worked hard for the bonus.
Annual bonuses are paid in December.
There is no bonus this month.
She spent her bonus on a trip.

words.definition: The ability to work well together in a group.
words.definitionUz: Teamwork — guruh bo‘lib yaxshi ishlash qobiliyati.
words.example1: Teamwork is essential for success.
words.example2: We achieved this through good teamwork.
words.example2Translation: Buni yaxshi jamoaviy ish orqali erishdik.
extraExamples: The project succeeded because of teamwork.
We need better teamwork in the office.
Teamwork skills are important in jobs.
They learned teamwork in the training.
extraExampleTranslations: Loyiha jamoaviy ish tufayli muvaffaqiyatli bo‘ldi.

words.definition: A person or company that gives jobs to people.
words.definitionUz: Employer — odamlarga ish beradigan shaxs yoki kompaniya.
words.example1: My employer is very kind.
words.example2: The employer offered a good salary.
words.example2Translation: Ish beruvchi yaxshi maosh taklif qildi.
words.example3: She has worked for the same employer for 10 years.
words.example3Translation: U 10 yildan beri bir ish beruvchida ishlaydi.
extraExamples: He is looking for a new employer.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p ish beruvchilar tajribali ishchilarni afzal ko‘rishadi.
Ish beruvchi o‘z vaqtida maosh to‘laydi.
Ish beruvchi yangi imtiyozlarni e’lon qildi.

words.definition: To officially leave your job.
words.definitionUz: Resign — rasmiy ravishda ishdan chiqish.
words.example1: He decided to resign from his position.
extraExamples: She resigned due to health reasons.
extraExampleTranslations: U darhol kuchga kiradigan tarzda ishdan chiqdi.

words.definition: To stop working because of old age.
words.definitionUz: Retire — yoshga yetgani uchun ishlashni to‘xtatish.
words.example1: My father will retire next year.
words.example2: She retired after 30 years of service.
words.example2Translation: U 30 yillik xizmatdan keyin pensiyaga chiqdi.
extraExamples: She retired to spend time with family.
Retiring is a big life change.
The company honored the retiring workers.
When do you plan to retire?
She is too young to retire.
extraExampleTranslations: U oilasi bilan vaqt o‘tkazish uchun pensiyaga chiqdi.
Kompaniya pensiyaga chiqayotgan ishchilarni hurmat qildi.
U pensiyaga chiqish uchun hali yosh.

words.definition: The state of not having a job.
words.definitionUz: Unemployment — ishga ega bo‘lmaslik holati.
words.example1: Unemployment is a big problem in many countries.
words.example3: He has been struggling with unemployment.
extraExamples: He is looking for work after unemployment.

words.definition: Working independently for different clients.
words.definitionUz: Freelance — turli mijozlar uchun mustaqil ishlash.
words.example1: She works as a freelance designer.
extraExamples: He left his job to go freelance.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar frilanser ishlarini afzal ko‘rishadi.
Frilanser platformalari ish topishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: Working from home or another place away from the office.
words.definitionUz: Remote work — ofisdan tashqarida, uyda yoki boshqa joydan ishlash.
words.example1: Many companies now offer remote work.
words.example1Translation: Ko‘p kompaniyalar endi masofaviy ishni taklif qilishadi.
words.example3: Remote work saves time and money.
words.example3Translation: Masofaviy ish vaqt va pulni tejaydi.
extraExamples: She has been doing remote work for two years.
Remote work became popular after the pandemic.
I like the flexibility of remote work.
Remote work has both advantages and disadvantages.
extraExampleTranslations: U ikki yildan beri masofaviy ishlaydi.
Masofaviy ish yaxshi intizomni talab qiladi.
Masofaviy ishning ham afzalliklari, ham kamchiliklari bor.

words.definition: The place where you work.
words.definitionUz: Workplace — ishlashingiz mumkin bo‘lgan joy.
words.example1: The workplace is modern and comfortable.
words.example2: Safety is important in the workplace.
extraExamples: He changed his workplace last year.
Many people spend most of their time at the workplace.
The workplace should be safe and healthy.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘tgan yili ish joyini o‘zgartirdi.
Ko‘p odamlar vaqtining ko‘p qismini ish joyida o‘tkazishadi.
Ish joyi xavfsiz va sog‘lom bo‘lishi kerak.

words.definition: How well someone does their job or a show.
words.definitionUz: Performance — ishni qanchalik yaxshi bajarish yoki tomosha.
words.example1: Her performance at work is excellent.
words.example3: The actor gave a great performance.
extraExamples: She received an award for her performance.
We need to improve our performance.

words.definition: Comments about how well someone is doing.
words.definitionUz: Feedback — biror ishni qanchalik yaxshi bajarganlik haqidagi fikrlar.
words.example1: The teacher gave positive feedback.
words.example2: We need your feedback on the product.
extraExamples: She received good feedback from her boss.
We collect feedback after every class.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz har darsdan keyin fikr yig‘amiz.
Salbiy fikr ham foydali bo‘lishi mumkin.

words.definition: A document showing your work experience and education.
words.definitionUz: Resume — ish tajribasi va ta’limingizni ko‘rsatuvchi hujjat.
words.example1: Please send your resume.
words.example3: A good resume is important for job applications.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshi rezyume ishga kirish uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Include your skills in the resume.
The resume should be one page.
She attached her resume to the email.
Make sure your resume has no mistakes.
Many companies ask for a resume.
extraExampleTranslations: Rezyume bitta sahifadan iborat bo‘lishi kerak.
Rezyumengizda xato bo‘lmasligiga ishonch hosil qiling.

words.definition: A type of business or economic activity.
words.definitionUz: Industry — muayyan turdagi biznes yoki iqtisodiy faoliyat.
words.example1: She works in the tourism industry.
words.example2: The technology industry is growing fast.
words.example3: The car industry employs many people.
words.example3Translation: Avtomobil sanoati ko‘p odamlarni ish bilan ta’minlaydi.
extraExamples: The fashion industry is very competitive.
He has 10 years of experience in the industry.
She wants to enter the film industry.
This is a key industry in the country.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p yangi sanoat tarmoqlari paydo bo‘lmoqda.

words.definition: Money earned after subtracting costs.
words.definitionUz: Profit — xarajatlarni ayirgandan keyin qoladigan foyda.
words.example1: The company made a big profit.
extraExamples: The shop is running at a loss, not profit.
Non-profit organizations don't aim for profit.

words.definition: When you lose money or something valuable.
words.definitionUz: Loss — pul yoki qimmatli narsani yo‘qotish.
words.example1: The company made a big loss this year.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya bu yili katta zarar ko‘rdi.
words.example2: It was a great loss for the family.
words.example2Translation: Bu oila uchun katta yo‘qotish edi.
words.example3: We need to reduce our losses.
extraExamples: He suffered a heavy financial loss.
The team played well despite the loss.
It is a big loss for the country.
She felt a sense of loss.
They sold the car at a loss.
The fire caused a huge loss.

words.definition: The process of growing or improving.
words.definitionUz: Development — o‘sish yoki yaxshilanish jarayoni.
words.example1: Personal development is important.
words.example2: The city is undergoing rapid development.
words.example3Translation: Dasturiy ta’minotni yaratish vaqt talab qiladi.
extraExamples: The company invests in staff development.
Urban development is changing the city.

words.definition: Movement towards a goal or improvement.
words.definitionUz: Progress — maqsad sari harakat yoki yaxshilanish.
words.example1: She is making good progress in English.
words.example1Translation: U ingliz tilida yaxshi oldinga siljimoqda.
words.example3: Medical science has made great progress.
extraExamples: We are seeing progress every day.
He reported on the progress of the work.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz har kuni oldinga siljishni ko‘rmoqdamiz.

words.definition: A name or symbol that identifies a product.
words.definitionUz: Brand — mahsulotni aniqlovchi nom yoki ramz.
words.example1: This is a famous brand of shoes.
words.example2Translation: U faqat taniqli brendlarni sotib oladi.
words.example3: The company is building its brand.
extraExamples: The brand name is very important.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu brend yaxshi sifatni taklif qiladi.

words.definition: A formal request or a computer program.
words.definitionUz: Application — rasmiy ariza yoki kompyuter dasturi.
words.example1: I sent my job application yesterday.
extraExamples: He is waiting for the result of his application.
The bank rejected my loan application.
extraExampleTranslations: Bank mening kredit arizamni rad etdi.

words.definition: Something successfully done after effort.
words.definitionUz: Achievement — mehnat bilan erishilgan muvaffaqiyat.
words.example1: Winning the award was a great achievement.
words.example2: She is proud of her achievements.
extraExamples: He listed his achievements on his resume.
The achievement took years of effort.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning eng katta yutug‘i — universitetni bitirish.
Yutuq ko‘p yillik mehnat talab qildi.

words.definition: A difficult task that tests your abilities.
words.definitionUz: Challenge — qobiliyatingizni sinovdan o‘tkazadigan qiyin vazifa.
words.example1: Learning a new language is a big challenge.
extraExamples: We need to meet this challenge.

words.definition: The duty to take care of something.
words.definitionUz: Responsibility — biror narsa uchun javobgar bo‘lish majburiyati.
words.example1: Parents have responsibility for their children.
words.example2: This job comes with a lot of responsibility.
words.example2Translation: Bu ish katta mas’uliyat bilan birga keladi.
words.example3: She takes responsibility for her mistakes.
words.example3Translation: U xatolari uchun mas’uliyatni o‘z zimmasiga oladi.
extraExamples: He has a sense of responsibility.
extraExampleTranslations: Mas’uliyatni o‘z zimmasiga olish yetuklikni ko‘rsatadi.

words.definition: The process of learning skills for a job or activity.
words.definitionUz: Training — ish yoki faoliyat uchun ko‘nikmalarni o‘rganish jarayoni.
words.example1: The company provides training for new employees.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniya yangi xodimlar uchun trening o‘tkazadi.
words.example2: She is attending a training course.

words.definition: A meeting where people learn or practice a skill.
words.definitionUz: Workshop — ko‘nikma o‘rganish yoki mashq qilish uchun o‘tkaziladigan yig‘in.
words.example1: I attended a writing workshop.
words.example2: The company organized a leadership workshop.
extraExamples: She gave a workshop on photography.
We have a workshop next week.
He learned a lot from the workshop.

words.definition: A formal meeting to discuss a job or topic.
words.definitionUz: Interview — ish yoki mavzu bo‘yicha rasmiy suhbat.
words.example1: I have a job interview tomorrow.
words.example2: She prepared well for the interview.
extraExamples: He is nervous about the interview.
She got the job after the interview.
The journalist did an interview with the president.

words.definition: A document listing your education and work experience.
words.definitionUz: CV — ta’lim va ish tajribangizni ko‘rsatuvchi hujjat.
words.example1: Please send your CV.
extraExamples: He attached his CV to the email.
A good CV helps you get interviews.
The CV should be clear and short.
Many companies ask for a CV.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshi CV suhbat olishga yordam beradi.
CV aniq va qisqa bo‘lishi kerak.

words.definition: A goal or objective to achieve.
words.definitionUz: Target — erishish kerak bo‘lgan maqsad.
words.example1: We need to meet our sales target.
words.example2: She set a new target for herself.
words.example2Translation: U o‘zi uchun yangi maqsad qo‘ydi.
words.example3: The target is to finish by Friday.
extraExamples: What is your target for this year?

words.definition: Something made to be sold.
words.definitionUz: Product — sotish uchun ishlab chiqarilgan narsa.
words.example1: This is a new product.
words.example3: The product is of high quality.
extraExamples: Customer feedback on the product is good.
The product is made in Uzbekistan.
She is responsible for product development.
The price of the product is reasonable.
extraExampleTranslations: Mijozlar mahsulot haqida yaxshi fikr bildirdi.

words.definition: All the people who work for a company or country.
words.definitionUz: Workforce — kompaniya yoki mamlakatdagi barcha ishlaydigan odamlar.
words.example1: The company has a skilled workforce.
words.example2: Women are an important part of the workforce.
extraExamples: We need to train the workforce.
A strong workforce drives the economy.
Many young people join the workforce.
The factory has a large workforce.
Improving the workforce is a priority.

words.definition: A person with a high-level job who makes important decisions.
words.definitionUz: Executive — muhim qarorlar qabul qiladigan yuqori lavozimdagi rahbar.
words.example1: The executive made an important decision.
extraExamples: She wants to become an executive.
The executive board approved the plan.
The executive is responsible for the department.

words.definition: The people who work for an organization.
words.definitionUz: Staff — tashkilotda ishlaydigan odamlar.
words.example1: The hotel staff is very friendly.
extraExamples: All staff must attend the meeting.
She is a member of staff.

words.definition: Time worked beyond normal hours.
words.definitionUz: Overtime — odatdagi ish vaqtidan ortiqcha ishlagan vaqt.
words.example1: I worked overtime last week.
words.example1Translation: Men o‘tgan hafta qo‘shimcha ish vaqtida ishladim.
words.example2Translation: Qo‘shimcha ish vaqti qo‘shimcha haq bilan to‘lanadi.
extraExamples: The company pays good overtime rates.
We need to finish this by working overtime.
Overtime is common in this job.
She earned extra money from overtime.
Working too much overtime is unhealthy.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya qo‘shimcha ish vaqti uchun yaxshi haq to‘laydi.
Buni tugatish uchun qo‘shimcha ish vaqtida ishlashimiz kerak.
Bu ishda qo‘shimcha ish vaqti odatiy hol.
U qo‘shimcha ish vaqtidan qo‘shimcha pul topdi.
Juda ko‘p qo‘shimcha ish vaqti sog‘liqqa zarar.

words.definition: A period of work time.
words.definitionUz: Shift — ish vaqtining bir davri (smena).
words.example1: I work the night shift.
words.example2: The morning shift starts at 8 AM.
extraExamples: The factory works in three shifts.
The evening shift is from 3 to 11.
She is on the afternoon shift.
Overtime is common during busy shifts.
extraExampleTranslations: Band smenalarda qo‘shimcha ish vaqti odatiy.

words.definition: A formal agreement between two parties.
words.definitionUz: Contract — ikki tomon o‘rtasidagi rasmiy kelishuv.
words.example1: We signed a one-year contract.
extraExamples: We need to renew the contract.
They are negotiating a new contract.
The contract period is two years.
extraExampleTranslations: U shartnomani diqqat bilan ko‘rib chiqdi.
Ular yangi shartnoma bo‘yicha muzokara olib borishmoqda.

words.definition: Money paid regularly after retirement.
words.definitionUz: Pension — pensiyaga chiqqandan keyin muntazam to‘lanadigan pul.
words.example1: He receives a good pension.
words.example2: She is saving for her pension.
extraExamples: Many people rely on their pension.
He retired on a full pension.
extraExampleTranslations: U to‘liq pensiya bilan pensiyaga chiqdi.

words.definition: A person who applies for a job or position.
words.definitionUz: Applicant — ish yoki lavozimga ariza bergan shaxs.
words.example1: There are many applicants for the job.
extraExamples: Each applicant must submit a CV.
The best applicant got the job.
The number of applicants is increasing.
Only qualified applicants will be considered.
extraExampleTranslations: Har bir arizachi rezyume topshirishi kerak.

words.definition: a job position that is available
words.definitionUz: Ishga qabul qilinadigan bo'sh lavozim
words.example1: There is a vacancy in the sales department.
words.example1Translation: Savdo bo'limida bo'sh ish o'rni bor.
words.example2Translation: U bo'sh ish o'rniga ariza topshirdi.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyada bir necha bo'sh ish o'rni bor.

words.definition: to find and hire new employees
words.definitionUz: Yangi xodimlarni topib ishga olish
words.example1: The company is recruiting new staff.
words.example2Translation: Ular uni o'tgan oy ishga oldilar.
words.example3: We need to recruit more teachers.
extraExamples: She was recruited by a big firm.

words.definition: to remove someone from their job
words.definitionUz: Xodimni ishidan bo'shatish
words.example1: The manager dismissed him.
words.example2: She was dismissed for being late.

words.definition: to discuss something to reach an agreement
words.definitionUz: Kelishuvga erishish uchun muhokama qilish
words.example1: They are negotiating a new contract.
words.example1Translation: Ular yangi shartnoma bo'yicha muzokara olib bormoqdalar.
words.example2Translation: U yaxshiroq maosh haqida muzokara qildi.
words.example3: We need to negotiate the price.

words.definition: the amount of work a person has to do
words.definitionUz: Bir odam bajarishi kerak bo'lgan ish miqdori
words.example1: She has a heavy workload.

words.definition: a strong desire to achieve success
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatga erishishga bo'lgan kuchli istak
words.example1: She has great ambition.
words.example2: His ambition is to become a doctor.

words.definition: a part of the economy or society
words.definitionUz: Iqtisodiyot yoki jamiyatning bir qismi
words.example1: She works in the education sector.

words.definition: a large company or group of companies
words.definitionUz: Katta kompaniya yoki kompaniyalar guruhi
words.example1: He works for a big corporation.

words.definition: a person who starts and runs a business
words.definitionUz: Biznes boshlab, boshqaruvchi shaxs
words.example1: He is a successful entrepreneur.
words.example3: She wants to be an entrepreneur.

words.definition: a new business venture
words.definitionUz: Yangi biznes loyihasi
words.example1: He founded a tech startup.

words.definition: the rate of producing goods or results
words.definitionUz: Mahsulot yoki natija ishlab chiqarish darajasi
words.example1: Good sleep increases productivity.

words.definition: the ability to do something well without wasting time or energy
words.definitionUz: Vaqt va kuch sarflamasdan yaxshi ish bajarish qobiliyati
words.example1: We need to improve efficiency.

words.definition: the ability to lead a group
words.definitionUz: Guruhni boshqarish qobiliyati
words.example1: He has strong leadership skills.
words.example3: She took on leadership of the team.
words.example3Translation: U jamoa rahbarligini o'z zimmasiga oldi.

words.definition: the process of controlling and organizing
words.definitionUz: Nazorat qilish va tashkil etish jarayoni
words.example1: The management made a good decision.
words.example3: Good management is key to success.

words.definition: a qualification from a university
words.definitionUz: Universitetdan olingan malaka
words.example1: She has a degree in psychology.
words.example2: He is studying for a master's degree.
words.example2Translation: U magistrlik darajasini olish uchun o'qiydi.
words.example3: A degree is important for this job.

words.definition: the main subject studied at university
words.definitionUz: Universitetda o'qiladigan asosiy fan
words.example1: What is your major?

words.definition: a talk given to teach a group
words.definitionUz: Guruhga dars berish uchun nutq
words.example1: The professor gave an interesting lecture.
words.example2: I have a lecture at 10 am.

words.definition: a small class for discussion
words.definitionUz: Muhokama uchun kichik dars
words.example1: I attended a seminar on marketing.

words.definition: a task given to students
words.definitionUz: Talabalarga beriladigan vazifa
words.example1: I have a lot of assignments.
words.example3: The teacher gave us an assignment.

words.definition: careful study to discover new facts
words.definitionUz: Yangi faktlarni kashf etish uchun chuqur o'rganish
words.example1: She is doing research on history.
words.example1Translation: U tarix bo'yicha tadqiqot olib bormoqda.
words.example3: I need to research this topic.
words.example3Translation: Men bu mavzuni tadqiq qilishim kerak.

words.definition: a short piece of writing on a subject
words.definitionUz: Biror mavzu bo'yicha qisqa yozma ish
words.example1: I wrote an essay on climate change.
words.example1Translation: Men iqlim o'zgarishi haqida insho yozdim.
words.example2: The teacher gave us an essay.

words.definition: natural ability to do something well
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni yaxshi bajarishga tabiiy qobiliyat
words.example1: She has a talent for singing.

words.definition: physical or mental energy used to do something
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni bajarish uchun sarflanadigan kuch
words.example1: She put a lot of effort into her studies.

words.definition: the reason for wanting to do something
words.definitionUz: Biror ishni qilish istagining sababi
words.example1: She has strong motivation.

words.definition: the ability to focus on one thing
words.definitionUz: Bir narsaga diqqatni qaratish qobiliyati
words.example1: I need better concentration.

words.definition: the practice of training to obey rules
words.definitionUz: Qoidalarga bo'ysunishni o'rgatish
words.example1: Discipline is important in school.

words.definition: a person who has completed a university course
words.definitionUz: Universitet kursini tugatgan shaxs
words.example1: She is a university graduate.

words.definition: money given to support studies
words.definitionUz: O'qishni qo'llab-quvvatlash uchun beriladigan pul
words.example1: She won a scholarship.

words.definition: the grounds of a university
words.definitionUz: Universitetning maydoni
words.example1: The campus is very beautiful.

words.definition: related to education and learning
words.definitionUz: Ta'lim va o'qish bilan bog'liq
words.example1: She has an academic background.

words.definition: connected with real situations rather than ideas
words.definitionUz: Nazariy emas, haqiqiy holatlar bilan bog'liq
words.example1: The course has practical lessons.

words.definition: ideas used to explain something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani tushuntirish uchun ishlatiladigan g'oyalar
words.example1: We learned theory in class.

words.definition: education at university level
words.definitionUz: Universitet darajasidagi ta'lim
words.example1: Higher education is important.
words.example2: She wants to continue higher education.

words.definition: improving abilities and knowledge
words.definitionUz: Qobiliyat va bilimlarni yaxshilash
words.example1: Skill development is important for career.
words.example2: The program focuses on skill development.

words.definition: lack of success
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyatsizlik
words.example1: Failure is part of learning.

words.definition: to examine something in detail
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani batafsil o'rganish
words.example1: We need to analyse the data.

words.definition: to judge the quality or value of something
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning sifati yoki qiymatini baholash
words.example1: The teacher will evaluate your work.
words.example2: We need to evaluate the results.

words.definition: a short version of a longer text
words.definitionUz: Uzun matnning qisqacha versiyasi
words.example1: Write a summary of the text.
words.example2: Here is a summary of the meeting.
words.example3: The summary is short and clear.

words.definition: copying someone else's work without permission
words.definitionUz: Boshqa odamning ishini ruxsatsiz nusxalash
words.example1: Plagiarism is not allowed.

words.definition: a unit of a course or program
words.definitionUz: Kurs yoki dasturning bir bo'lagi
words.example1: This is the first module.

words.definition: A long piece of writing on a particular subject, especially for a university degree.
words.definitionUz: Dissertatsiya – muayyan mavzu bo‘yicha yozilgan uzun ilmiy ish, ayniqsa universitet darajasi uchun.
words.example1: She is writing her dissertation on climate change.
words.example1Translation: U iqlim o‘zgarishi haqida dissertatsiya yozmoqda.
words.example2: The dissertation took two years to complete.
words.example2Translation: Dissertatsiyani tugatish ikki yil davom etdi.

words.definition: A long piece of writing on a subject for a university degree, often shorter than a dissertation.
words.definitionUz: Tezis – universitet darajasi uchun mavzu bo‘yicha yozilgan uzun ish, ko‘pincha dissertatsiyadan qisqaroq.
words.example1: His thesis was on artificial intelligence.
words.example1Translation: Uning tezisi sun’iy intellekt haqida edi.

words.definition: A lesson or class where a small group discusses a subject with a tutor.
words.definitionUz: O‘quv mashg‘uloti – kichik guruhda o‘qituvchi bilan mavzuni muhokama qiladigan dars.
words.example1: I have a tutorial on Monday.
words.example2: The tutorial helped me understand the topic.
words.example2Translation: O‘quv mashg‘uloti mavzuni tushunishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: A division within a university for a particular subject area.
words.definitionUz: Fakultet – universitet ichidagi muayyan fan sohasi bo‘limi.
words.example1: She is in the faculty of medicine.

words.definition: A division of a university, company, or government for a specific area of work.
words.definitionUz: Bo‘lim – universitet, kompaniya yoki hukumatning muayyan ish sohasi bo‘limi.
words.example1: The English department is on the second floor.
words.example2: He works in the marketing department.

words.definition: An official document proving that you have achieved something.
words.definitionUz: Sertifikat – biror narsaga erishganingizni tasdiqlovchi rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: She received a language certificate.
words.example2: The certificate is important for the job.

words.definition: An official document showing that you have completed a course or degree.
words.definitionUz: Diplom – kurs yoki darajani tugatganingizni ko‘rsatuvchi rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: She got her diploma last year.
words.example2: A high school diploma is required.

words.definition: Related to training for a particular job or skill.
words.definitionUz: Kasbiy – muayyan ish yoki ko‘nikma uchun o‘qitish bilan bog‘liq.
words.example1: He took a vocational course.

words.definition: Concentrated and involving a lot of effort in a short time.
words.definitionUz: Intensiv – qisqa vaqt ichida ko‘p kuch sarflanadigan va diqqat markazida bo‘lgan.
words.example1: She took an intensive English course.
words.example1Translation: U ingliz tilining intensiv kursini o‘tdi.
words.example3Translation: Intensiv o‘qish unga o‘tishga yordam berdi.

words.definition: Covering a large area or including a lot of information.
words.definitionUz: Keng qamrovli – katta maydonni qamrab oladigan yoki ko‘p ma’lumotni o‘z ichiga oladigan.
words.example1: He has extensive knowledge of history.
words.example1Translation: Uning tarix bo‘yicha keng qamrovli bilimi bor.
words.example2: The library has an extensive collection.

words.definition: The power or skill to do something.
words.definitionUz: Qobiliyat – biror ishni bajarish kuchi yoki mahorati.
words.example1: She has the ability to learn quickly.
words.example2: His ability in math is excellent.

words.definition: The business of encouraging and organizing travel.
words.definitionUz: Turizm – sayohatni rag‘batlantirish va tashkil etish sohasi.
words.example1: Tourism is important for the economy.

words.definition: An exciting and unusual experience.
words.definitionUz: Sarguzasht – hayajonli va g‘ayrioddiy tajriba.
words.example1: Traveling is a great adventure.
words.example2: They went on an adventure in the mountains.

words.definition: To travel around a place to find out about it.
words.definitionUz: Kashf qilmoq – biror joyni aylanib, uni o‘rganish.
words.example1: We explored the old city.
words.example2: She loves to explore new places.
words.example2Translation: U yangi joylarni kashf qilishni yaxshi ko‘radi.

words.definition: The feeling of confusion when you are in a new culture.
words.definitionUz: Madaniyat zarbasi – yangi madaniyatda chalkashlik hissi.
words.example1: She experienced culture shock when she moved abroad.
words.example1Translation: U chet elga ko‘chib o‘tgach, madaniyat zarbasini boshdan kechirdi.
words.example2: Culture shock is normal at first.
words.example3Translation: Madaniyat zarbasidan chiqish vaqt talab qiladi.
extraExamples: Culture shock in a new country.

words.definition: A place to stay or live, such as a hotel or apartment.
words.definitionUz: Turar joy – mehmonxona yoki kvartira kabi yashash joyi.
words.example1: We need accommodation for the night.

words.definition: A cheap place for travelers to stay, often with shared rooms.
words.definitionUz: Hostel – sayyohlar uchun arzon turar joy, ko‘pincha umumiy xonalar bilan.
words.example1: We stayed in a youth hostel.
words.example2: The hostel was clean and cheap.
words.example3: Book a bed in the hostel.

words.definition: An arrangement to reserve a place, ticket, or room.
words.definitionUz: Bron qilish – joy, chipta yoki xonani oldindan band qilish.
words.example1: I made a booking for the hotel.

words.definition: To decide that something planned will not happen.
words.definitionUz: Bekor qilmoq – rejalashtirilgan narsani amalga oshirmaslikka qaror qilish.
words.example1: We had to cancel the trip.
words.example1Translation: Biz sayohatni bekor qilishga majbur bo‘ldik.

words.definition: A long journey, especially by sea or in space.
words.definitionUz: Sayohat (uzoq) – ayniqsa dengiz yoki kosmosdagi uzoq sayohat.
words.example1: The voyage across the ocean took weeks.
words.example1Translation: Okean bo‘ylab sayohat bir necha hafta davom etdi.

words.definition: In or to a foreign country.
words.definitionUz: Chet elda yoki chet elga.
words.example1: She studies overseas.

words.definition: Traveling with a backpack, often on a low budget.
words.definitionUz: Ryukzak sayohati – ryukzak bilan, ko‘pincha arzon byudjetda sayohat qilish.
words.example1: Backpacking is popular among young people.

words.definition: A place or thing that draws visitors.
words.definitionUz: Diqqatga sazovor joy – mehmonlarni jalb qiladigan joy yoki narsa.
words.example1: The main attraction is the old castle.
words.example1Translation: Asosiy diqqatga sazovor joy – eski qal’a.

words.definition: A famous building or place that is easily recognized.
words.definitionUz: Diqqatga sazovor bino – osongina tanib olinadigan mashhur bino yoki joy.
words.example1: Big Ben is a famous London landmark.
words.example1Translation: Big Ben – Londondagi mashhur diqqatga sazovor bino.
words.example2: The tower is an important landmark.
words.example3: Use landmarks to find the way.
words.example3Translation: Yo‘l topish uchun diqqatga sazovor binolardan foydalaning.

words.definition: An object bought to remind you of a place you visited.
words.definitionUz: Esdalik sovg‘a – tashrif buyurgan joyingizni eslatuvchi buyum.
words.example1: I bought a souvenir from the market.
words.example1Translation: Men bozordan esdalik sovg‘a sotib oldim.
words.example2: She collected souvenirs from her travels.

words.definition: Worth remembering or easy to remember.
words.definitionUz: Esda qolarli – eslashga arziydigan yoki osongina esda qoladigan.
words.example1: It was a memorable trip.

words.definition: A plan of a journey showing places to visit and times.
words.definitionUz: Marshrut – sayohat rejasi, qaysi joylarga borish va vaqtlar ko‘rsatilgan.
words.example1: Check the itinerary carefully.
words.example2Translation: Marshrut uchta shaharni o‘z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: A book with information for travelers about a place.
words.definitionUz: Qo‘llanma – sayyohlar uchun joy haqida ma’lumot beruvchi kitob.
words.example1: I bought a guidebook for Paris.
words.example1Translation: Men Parij uchun qo‘llanma sotib oldim.

words.definition: The money used in a particular country.
words.definitionUz: Valyuta – muayyan mamlakatda ishlatiladigan pul.
words.example1: The currency in Uzbekistan is the som.

words.definition: The value of one currency compared to another.
words.definitionUz: Valyuta kursi – bir valyutaning ikkinchisiga nisbatan qiymati.
words.example1: The exchange rate is good today.
words.example2: Check the exchange rate before traveling.

words.definition: An official document that proves your identity and nationality for travel.
words.definitionUz: Pasport – sayohat uchun shaxsiyatingiz va fuqaroligingizni tasdiqlovchi rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: Don't forget your passport.
words.example3: Show your passport at the border.

words.definition: A journey made for a special purpose, such as exploration or research.
words.definitionUz: Ekspeditsiya – kashfiyot yoki tadqiqot kabi maxsus maqsad bilan amalga oshiriladigan sayohat.
words.example1: The expedition reached the mountain top.

words.definition: A holiday on a ship visiting different places.
words.definitionUz: Kruiz – turli joylarga tashrif buyuradigan kemada ta’til.
words.example1: We went on a Mediterranean cruise.

words.definition: Tourism that is environmentally friendly and supports local communities.
words.definitionUz: Eko-turizm – atrof-muhitga zararsiz va mahalliy jamiyatlarni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydigan turizm.
words.example1: Ecotourism is growing in popularity.

words.definition: A traveler who carries belongings in a backpack and travels cheaply.
words.definitionUz: Ryukzakchi – buyumlarini ryukzakda olib, arzon sayohat qiluvchi sayyoh.
words.example1: Many backpackers visit this city.

words.definition: A person who is traveling or who travels often.
words.definitionUz: Sayyoh – sayohat qilayotgan yoki tez-tez sayohat qiladigan shaxs.
words.example1: She is an experienced traveller.

words.definition: An official document allowing entry into a country.
words.definitionUz: Viza – mamlakatga kirishga ruxsat beruvchi rasmiy hujjat.
words.example1: I need a tourist visa.

words.definition: The process of entering and living in a new country.
words.definitionUz: Immigratsiya – yangi mamlakatga kirish va unda yashash jarayoni.
words.example1: Immigration control is strict.

words.definition: The line separating two countries.
words.definitionUz: Chegara – ikki mamlakatni ajratuvchi chiziq.
words.example1: We crossed the border easily.

words.definition: The place at a border where officials check goods and luggage.
words.definitionUz: Bojxona – chegarada xodimlar yuk va chamadonlarni tekshiradigan joy.
words.example1: Go through customs.

words.definition: A long-term change in the Earth's climate, especially due to human activity.
words.definitionUz: Iqlim o'zgarishi — Yer iqlimining uzoq muddatli o'zgarishi, ayniqsa inson faoliyati tufayli.
words.example1: Climate change is one of the biggest challenges of our time.
words.example1Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi zamonamizning eng katta muammolaridan biri.
words.example2: We must take action against climate change.
words.example2Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi harakat qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3: Climate change affects weather patterns worldwide.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi butun dunyoda ob-havo naqshlariga ta'sir qiladi.
extraExamples: Climate change causes rising sea levels.
Governments are discussing solutions to climate change.
She is concerned about climate change.
Reducing waste helps fight climate change.
The effects of climate change are visible.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o'zgarishi dengiz sathining ko'tarilishiga sabab bo'ladi.
Hukumatlar iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi yechimlarni muhokama qilmoqda.
Chiqindilarni kamaytirish iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi kurashga yordam beradi.
Iqlim o'zgarishi qishloq xo'jaligiga ta'sir qiladi.

words.definition: The increase in the Earth's average temperature.
words.definitionUz: Global isish — Yer o'rtacha haroratining ko'tarilishi.
words.example1: Global warming is caused by greenhouse gases.
words.example1Translation: Global isish issiqxona gazlari tufayli yuzaga keladi.
words.example2: We need to stop global warming.
extraExamples: Reducing carbon emissions helps fight global warming.
She wrote an essay on global warming.
Global warming is a serious threat.
Actions today can slow global warming.
extraExampleTranslations: Global isish barcha mamlakatlarga ta'sir qiladi.
Uglerod chiqindilarini kamaytirish global isishga qarshi kurashga yordam beradi.
U global isish haqida insho yozdi.
Bugungi harakatlar global isishni sekinlashtirishi mumkin.

words.definition: Energy from sources that are naturally replenished.
words.definitionUz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya — tabiiy ravishda to'ldiriladigan manbalardan olinadigan energiya.
words.example1: Solar power is a type of renewable energy.
words.example1Translation: Quyosh energiyasi qayta tiklanadigan energiyaning bir turi.
words.example2: Countries are investing in renewable energy.
words.example2Translation: Mamlakatlar qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga sarmoya kiritmoqda.
words.example3Translation: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya ifloslanishni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Renewable energy is better for the environment.
extraExampleTranslations: Qayta tiklanadigan energiya yangi ish o'rinlarini yaratadi.
U qayta tiklanadigan energiya loyihalarini qo'llab-quvvatlaydi.
Qayta tiklanadigan energiya atrof-muhit uchun yaxshiroq.
Ko'p uylar qayta tiklanadigan energiyadan foydalanadi.

words.definition: Able to be maintained without harming the environment.
words.definitionUz: Barqaror — atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazmasdan davom ettirish mumkin bo'lgan.
words.example1: We need sustainable development.

words.definition: Not harmful to the environment.
words.definitionUz: Ekologik toza — atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazmaydigan.
words.example1: Use eco-friendly bags instead of plastic.
words.example1Translation: Plastmassa o'rniga ekologik toza sumkalardan foydalaning.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya ekologik toza mahsulotlar ishlab chiqaradi.
words.example3Translation: Ekologik toza amaliyotlar sayyoramizga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: We should live an eco-friendly lifestyle.
extraExampleTranslations: U ekologik toza tozalash vositalarini afzal ko'radi.
Ekologik toza qadoqlash mashhur bo'lib bormoqda.
Biz ekologik toza turmush tarzida yashashimiz kerak.

words.definition: The amount of carbon dioxide released by a person or activity.
words.definitionUz: Uglerod izi — odam yoki faoliyat chiqaradigan uglerod gazining miqdori.
words.example1: We should reduce our carbon footprint.
words.example3: Eating less meat can lower your carbon footprint.
words.example3Translation: Kamroq go'sht yeyish uglerod izini pasaytirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: Companies are measuring their carbon footprint.
A smaller carbon footprint is better for the planet.
Using public transport reduces carbon footprint.
She tries to minimize her carbon footprint.
extraExampleTranslations: Kichikroq uglerod izi sayyora uchun yaxshiroq.
Jamoat transportidan foydalanish uglerod izini kamaytiradi.
U uglerod izini minimallashtirishga harakat qiladi.

words.translation: yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlar
words.definition: Animals or plants at risk of disappearing.
words.definitionUz: Yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlar — yo'qolish xavfi ostidagi hayvonlar yoki o'simliklar.
words.example1: Many endangered species need protection.
words.example1Translation: Ko'p yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlar himoyaga muhtoj.
words.example2: The panda is an endangered species.
words.example2Translation: Panda yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi tur.
words.example3Translation: Biz yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarni saqlashimiz kerak.
extraExamples: There are laws to protect endangered species.
The tiger is an endangered species.
Endangered species are important for biodiversity.
The government listed more endangered species.
extraExampleTranslations: O'rmonlarni kesish yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarga tahdid solmoqda.
Yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarni himoya qilish uchun qonunlar bor.
Yo'lbars yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi tur.
Muhofaza qilish yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarga yordam beradi.
U yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarni o'rganadi.
Yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlar biologik xilma-xillik uchun muhim.
Hukumat ko'proq yo'q bo'lib ketish xavfi ostidagi turlarni ro'yxatga oldi.

words.definition: The protection of nature and wildlife.
words.definitionUz: Muhofaza qilish — tabiat va yovvoyi hayvonlarni himoya qilish.
words.example1: Conservation is important for future generations.
words.example1Translation: Muhofaza qilish kelajak avlodlar uchun muhim.
words.example2Translation: U yovvoyi hayvonlarni muhofaza qilish sohasida ishlaydi.
words.example3Translation: Suvni muhofaza qilish qurg'oqchilik paytida yordam beradi.
extraExampleTranslations: O'rmonlarni muhofaza qilish iqlim o'zgarishining oldini oladi.
Milliy bog'lar muhofaza qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The cutting down of large areas of forest.
words.definitionUz: O'rmonlarni kesish — katta o'rmon maydonlarini yo'q qilish.
words.example1: Deforestation causes climate change.
words.example1Translation: O'rmonlarni kesish iqlim o'zgarishiga sabab bo'ladi.
words.example3Translation: O'rmonlarni kesish hayvonlar yashash joylarini yo'q qiladi.
extraExamples: Deforestation is a major environmental problem.
Governments are trying to reduce deforestation.
Illegal deforestation continues in some areas.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumatlar o'rmonlarni kesishni kamaytirishga harakat qilmoqda.
O'rmonlarni kesish tuproq eroziyasiga olib keladi.
U o'rmonlarni kesishga qarshi kampaniya olib boradi.
Ba'zi hududlarda noqonuniy o'rmon kesish davom etmoqda.
Qayta o'rmon ekish o'rmonlarni kesishni qaytarishga yordam beradi.
O'rmonlarni kesish mahalliy aholiga ta'sir qiladi.

words.definition: A sudden event caused by nature that causes great damage.
words.definitionUz: Tabiiy ofat — tabiat tomonidan keltiriladigan katta zarar yetkazuvchi kutilmagan voqea.
words.example1: The earthquake was a terrible natural disaster.
words.example2: Many people died in the natural disaster.
words.example2Translation: Tabiiy ofatda ko'p odamlar halok bo'ldi.
extraExamples: The country suffered from a natural disaster.
Natural disasters can be predicted sometimes.
She helps victims of natural disasters.
The natural disaster destroyed many homes.
International aid came after the natural disaster.
extraExampleTranslations: Tabiiy ofatlarni ba'zida oldindan aytish mumkin.
U tabiiy ofat qurbonlariga yordam beradi.
Tabiiy ofat ko'p uylarni vayron qildi.
Tabiiy ofatdan keyin xalqaro yordam keldi.

words.definition: A large amount of water covering land that is usually dry.
words.definitionUz: To'shqin — odatda quruq bo'lgan yerni suv bosishi.
words.example1: The heavy rain caused a flood.
words.example2: Many homes were destroyed by the flood.
words.example3: People were evacuated during the flood.
extraExamples: Floods happen every year in this region.
She volunteered to help flood victims.
The river overflowed and caused a flood.
The city recovered from the flood.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu hududda har yili to'shqin bo'ladi.
U to'shqin qurbonlariga yordam berish uchun ixtiyoriy bo'ldi.

words.definition: A long period without rain.
words.definitionUz: Qurg'oqchilik — uzoq vaqt yomg'ir yog'masligi.
words.example1: The drought destroyed the crops.
words.example2: Many areas are suffering from drought.
words.example3: Water conservation is important during drought.
extraExamples: The drought lasted for three years.
Farmers are affected by the drought.
The government declared a drought emergency.
She prayed for rain during the drought.
extraExampleTranslations: Hukumat qurg'oqchilik favqulodda holatini e'lon qildi.
Og'ir qurg'oqchilik paytida o'simliklar qurib qoladi.
U qurg'oqchilik paytida yomg'ir uchun duo qildi.

words.definition: A sudden shaking of the ground.
words.definitionUz: Zilzila — yerni birdan silkitadigan hodisa.
words.example1: The earthquake destroyed many buildings.
words.example3: Earthquakes happen frequently in this region.
words.example3Translation: Bu hududda zilzilalar tez-tez sodir bo'ladi.
extraExamples: The earthquake measured 7.2 on the Richter scale.
Rescue teams arrived after the earthquake.
extraExampleTranslations: Zilzila Richter shkalasi bo'yicha 7.2 ball edi.

words.definition: Knowledge or understanding of a situation.
words.definitionUz: Xabardorlik — biror holat haqida bilim yoki tushunchaga ega bo'lish.
words.example1: Environmental awareness is increasing.
words.example2: The campaign raised awareness about health.
words.example3: We need more awareness about climate change.
words.example3Translation: Iqlim o'zgarishi haqida ko'proq xabardorlik kerak.
extraExamples: The school held an awareness day.
He spread awareness through his posts.
extraExampleTranslations: Xabardorlik kasalliklarning oldini olishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The effect or influence of one thing on another.
words.definitionUz: Ta'sir — bir narsaning boshqasiga ta'siri yoki natijasi.
words.example1: The impact of climate change is serious.
words.example2: Technology has a big impact on our lives.
words.example3: The new law will have a positive impact.
extraExamples: The impact of the earthquake was huge.
Her speech had a strong impact on the audience.
We need to study the environmental impact.
Social media has a huge impact on youth.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning nutqi tinglovchilarga kuchli ta'sir qildi.
Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar yoshlarga katta ta'sir qiladi.

words.definition: To have an influence on something.
words.definitionUz: Ta'sir qilmoq — biror narsaga ta'sir ko'rsatish.
words.example1: Pollution affects our health.
words.example2: The weather will affect our plans.
words.example3: How does this decision affect you?
words.example3Translation: Bu qaror sizga qanday ta'sir qiladi?
extraExamples: Technology affects the way we communicate.
It will not affect the result.

words.definition: A problem that affects the whole world.
words.definitionUz: Global muammo — butun dunyoga ta'sir qiladigan muammo.
words.example1: Climate change is a global issue.
words.example2: Poverty is a serious global issue.
words.example3: We must solve global issues together.
words.example3Translation: Global muammolarni birgalikda hal qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The pandemic was a global issue.
She is concerned about global issues.
Technology can help solve global issues.
extraExampleTranslations: Global muammolar global yechimlarni talab qiladi.
Global muammolar kelajak avlodlarga ta'sir qiladi.
Texnologiya global muammolarni hal qilishga yordam berishi mumkin.

words.definition: The release of gases or substances into the air.
words.definitionUz: Chiqindi (gaz) — havoga gaz yoki moddalarni chiqarish.
words.example1: Car emissions cause pollution.
words.example2: We need to reduce carbon emissions.
extraExamples: The government set limits on emissions.
Emission from power plants is a big problem.

words.definition: The degree of heat or cold.
words.definitionUz: Harorat — issiqlik yoki sovuqlik darajasi.
words.example1: The temperature is rising.
extraExamples: Global temperature is rising due to climate change.
The temperature in the desert is very high.
extraExampleTranslations: Global harorat iqlim o'zgarishi tufayli ko'tarilmoqda.

words.definition: Processing used materials to make new products.
words.definitionUz: Qayta ishlash — ishlatilgan materiallarni yangi mahsulotlar uchun qayta ishlatish.
words.example1: Recycling helps protect the environment.
words.example1Translation: Qayta ishlash atrof-muhitni himoya qilishga yordam beradi.
words.example2Translation: Biz uyda qayta ishlashni amalga oshiramiz.
extraExamples: The city has a good recycling program.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar yaxshi qayta ishlash dasturiga ega.
U chiqindilarni qayta ishlash uchun ajratadi.

words.definition: The variety of plant and animal life in the world.
words.definitionUz: Biologik xilma-xillik — dunyodagi o'simlik va hayvonlarning xilma-xilligi.
words.example1: Biodiversity is important for a healthy ecosystem.
words.example1Translation: Biologik xilma-xillik sog'lom ekotizim uchun muhim.
words.example3Translation: Biz biologik xilma-xillikni himoya qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Loss of biodiversity is a global problem.
extraExampleTranslations: Muhofaza qilish biologik xilma-xillikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
Iqlim o'zgarishi biologik xilma-xillikka tahdid solmoqda.
Biologik xilma-xillikni himoya qilish har kimning mas'uliyati.

words.definition: A community of living things and their environment.
words.definitionUz: Ekotizim — tirik mavjudotlar va ularning atrof-muhitidan iborat jamoa.
words.example1: The forest is a complex ecosystem.
words.example3Translation: Biz dengiz ekotizimlarini himoya qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The coral reef is a delicate ecosystem.
Biodiversity is key to a healthy ecosystem.
Ecosystems provide us with clean air and water.
extraExampleTranslations: Ekotizimlar bizga toza havo va suv beradi.

words.definition: The warming of the Earth caused by certain gases in the atmosphere.
words.definitionUz: Issiqxona effekti — atmosferadagi ba'zi gazlar tufayli Yerning isishi.
words.example1: The greenhouse effect causes global warming.
words.example1Translation: Issiqxona effekti global isishga sabab bo'ladi.
words.example2: We need to reduce the greenhouse effect.
words.example3: Carbon dioxide is a major greenhouse gas.
words.example3Translation: Uglerod gazlari issiqxona gazlarining asosiy turidir.
extraExamples: The greenhouse effect is natural but intensified by humans.
Understanding the greenhouse effect is important.
Greenhouse gases trap heat in the atmosphere.
Reducing emissions helps control the greenhouse effect.
The greenhouse effect leads to climate change.
Burning fossil fuels increases the greenhouse effect.
extraExampleTranslations: Issiqxona effekti tabiiy, lekin insonlar uni kuchaytirmoqda.
Issiqxona gazlari issiqlikni atmosferada ushlab turadi.
Chiqindilarni kamaytirish issiqxona effektini nazorat qilishga yordam beradi.
Issiqxona effekti iqlim o'zgarishiga olib keladi.
Qazilma yoqilg'ilarni yoqish issiqxona effektini kuchaytiradi.

words.definition: Energy from the sun used to produce electricity.
words.definitionUz: Quyosh energiyasi — quyoshdan elektr energiyasi ishlab chiqarish uchun foydalaniladigan energiya.
words.example1: Solar power is a clean energy source.
words.example3: Solar power helps reduce electricity bills.
extraExamples: The government supports solar power projects.
Solar power panels are installed on the roof.
Solar power can be used in remote areas.
The future of energy is solar power.
extraExampleTranslations: Quyosh energiyasini uzoq hududlarda ishlatish mumkin.

words.definition: Energy produced by wind turbines.
words.definitionUz: Shamol energiyasi — shamol turbinalari yordamida ishlab chiqariladigan energiya.
words.example1: Wind energy is a renewable source.
words.example2: The country produces electricity from wind energy.
words.example2Translation: Mamlakat shamol energiyasidan elektr energiyasi ishlab chiqaradi.
words.example3: Wind energy helps fight climate change.
words.example3Translation: Shamol energiyasi iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi kurashishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Wind energy is clean and sustainable.
The wind energy industry creates jobs.
Wind energy works best in windy areas.
Many countries invest in wind energy.
Wind energy reduces dependence on fossil fuels.
extraExampleTranslations: Shamol energiyasi sanoati ish o'rinlarini yaratadi.
Shamol energiyasi shamolli hududlarda yaxshi ishlaydi.
Ko'p mamlakatlar shamol energiyasiga sarmoya kiritadi.
Shamol energiyasi qazilma yoqilg'ilarga bog'liqlikni kamaytiradi.

words.definition: A person who works to protect the environment.
words.definitionUz: Ekolog — atrof-muhitni himoya qilish uchun ishlaydigan odam.
words.example1: She is an environmentalist.
extraExamples: He became an environmentalist after university.

words.definition: The ability to maintain something without harming the environment.
words.definitionUz: Barqarorlik — atrof-muhitga zarar yetkazmasdan biror narsani saqlab qolish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Sustainability is key to our future.
words.example3: We need more sustainability in daily life.
extraExamples: Sustainability includes economic, social, and environmental aspects.
Sustainability goals were set by the UN.
Achieving sustainability is challenging but necessary.
extraExampleTranslations: Barqarorlik iqtisodiy, ijtimoiy va ekologik jihatlarni o'z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: A critical situation caused by rapid climate change.
words.definitionUz: Iqlim inqirozi — tez iqlim o'zgarishi tufayli yuzaga kelgan jiddiy vaziyat.
words.example1: The climate crisis is urgent.
words.example2: We must act now to solve the climate crisis.
words.example2Translation: Iqlim inqirozini hal qilish uchun hozir harakat qilishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Scientists warn about the climate crisis.
The climate crisis is caused by human activity.
Young people are fighting the climate crisis.
The climate crisis leads to extreme weather.
Solutions to the climate crisis exist.
She wrote about the climate crisis.
Global cooperation is needed for the climate crisis.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim inqirozi inson faoliyati tufayli yuzaga kelgan.
Iqlim inqirozi ekstremal ob-havoga olib keladi.
Iqlim inqirozi uchun global hamkorlik kerak.

words.definition: Using or relating to computer technology.
words.definitionUz: Raqamli — kompyuter texnologiyasidan foydalanadigan yoki unga tegishli.
words.example1: We live in the digital age.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamli o'zgarishlar hamma joyda sodir bo'lmoqda.

words.definition: A system of connected computers or people.
words.definitionUz: Tarmoq — bir-biriga ulangan kompyuterlar yoki odamlar tizimi.
words.example1: The internet is a global network.
words.example2: She built a strong professional network.
words.example3: The company has a wide network.
extraExamples: The transport network is well developed.

words.definition: Programs used by computers.
words.definitionUz: Dasturiy ta'minot — kompyuterlar ishlatadigan dasturlar.
words.example1: This software is very useful.
extraExamples: Software development is a growing field.
extraExampleTranslations: Dasturiy ta'minotni yaratish o'sib borayotgan soha.
Dasturiy ta'minot muammolarni hal qilishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The protection of computer systems from attacks.
words.definitionUz: Kiberxavfsizlik — kompyuter tizimlarini hujumlardan himoya qilish.
words.example1: Cybersecurity is very important today.
extraExamples: The government focuses on national cybersecurity.

words.definition: The right to keep personal information private.
words.definitionUz: Shaxsiy hayot — shaxsiy ma'lumotni maxfiy saqlash huquqi.
words.example1: Privacy is important on the internet.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniyalar foydalanuvchilarning shaxsiy hayotini hurmat qilishlari kerak.
extraExamples: She deleted her account for privacy reasons.
extraExampleTranslations: Ilova foydalanuvchilarning shaxsiy hayotini hurmat qiladi.
U shaxsiy sabablarga ko'ra akkauntini o'chirdi.

words.definition: Facts or information used for analysis.
words.definitionUz: Ma'lumotlar — tahlil qilish uchun ishlatiladigan faktlar yoki axborot.
words.example1: The company collects customer data.
words.example3: She analyzes data for her research.
words.example3Translation: U tadqiqoti uchun ma'lumotlarni tahlil qiladi.
extraExamples: Data is stored in the cloud.
The report is based on recent data.

words.definition: The ability of machines to think and learn like humans.
words.definitionUz: Sun'iy intellekt — mashinalarning inson kabi fikrlash va o'rganish qobiliyati.
words.example1: Artificial intelligence is changing the world.
extraExamples: Many jobs will be affected by artificial intelligence.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko'p ish o'rinlari sun'iy intellekt ta'sirida qoladi.

words.definition: A new idea, method, or product.
words.definitionUz: Innovatsiya — yangi fikr, usul yoki mahsulot.
words.example1: Innovation drives progress.
extraExamples: She is known for her innovation.
The new product is an innovation.

words.definition: A general direction in which something is developing.
words.definitionUz: Tendensiya — biror narsaning rivojlanish yo'nalishi.
words.example1: This is a new trend in fashion.
words.example3: The trend is towards renewable energy.
extraExamples: This trend is popular among young people.
extraExampleTranslations: Global tendensiyalar mahalliy bozorga ta'sir qiladi.

words.definition: Spreading quickly on the internet.
words.definitionUz: Viral — internetda tez tarqaladigan.
words.example1: The video went viral.
words.example3: Viral content gets millions of views.
extraExamples: The challenge went viral on social media.
She hopes her song goes viral.
The photo was viral for days.
extraExampleTranslations: U qo'shig'i viral bo'lishiga umid qiladi.
Foto bir necha kun viral bo'ldi.

words.definition: An opinion or remark about something.
words.definitionUz: Izoh — biror narsa haqidagi fikr yoki mulohaza.
words.example1: She left a positive comment.
extraExamples: The teacher asked for student comments.

words.definition: Current advanced tools and systems.
words.definitionUz: Zamonaviy texnologiya — hozirgi ilg'or asboblar va tizimlar.
words.example1: Modern technology makes life easier.
words.example2: We use modern technology in education.
extraExamples: Modern technology can solve global problems.
He is interested in modern technology.
extraExampleTranslations: Zamonaviy texnologiya global muammolarni hal qilishi mumkin.
Zamonaviy texnologiya yangi ko'nikmalarni talab qiladi.

words.definition: A benefit or something that helps you.
words.definitionUz: Afzallik — foyda beradigan yoki yordam beradigan narsa.
words.example1: One advantage of living in the city is good public transport.
words.example1Translation: Shaharda yashashning bir afzalligi — yaxshi jamoat transporti.
words.example2Translation: Ingliz tilini o‘rganish ko‘p afzalliklarga ega.
words.example3: The main advantage of this phone is its battery life.
words.example3Translation: Bu telefonning asosiy afzalligi — batareya quvvati.
extraExamples: What are the advantages and disadvantages?
Technology has many advantages in education.
She used her advantage to win the game.
Remote work has the advantage of flexibility.
Knowing languages is a big advantage in business.
The team has an advantage because they trained more.
There are both advantages and risks.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘z afzalligidan foydalanib o‘yinda g‘alaba qozondi.
Bir necha tilni bilish biznesda katta afzallik.
Jamoa ko‘proq mashq qilgani uchun afzallikka ega.

words.definition: A negative point or something that causes problems.
words.definitionUz: Kamchilik — salbiy tomon yoki muammo tug‘diradigan narsa.
words.example1: One disadvantage of living in the city is the noise.
words.example2: The main disadvantage is the high cost.
words.example3: Every choice has advantages and disadvantages.
words.example3Translation: Har bir tanlovning afzalliklari va kamchiliklari bor.
extraExamples: What are the disadvantages of online learning?
The disadvantage is that it takes more time.
Remote work has some disadvantages too.
Despite the disadvantages, it is still popular.
extraExampleTranslations: Masofaviy ishning ham ba’zi kamchiliklari bor.
Kamchiliklarga qaramay, u hali ham mashhur.
Moliyaviy kamchilik ta’limga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: The power to affect how someone thinks or behaves.
words.definitionUz: Ta’sir — kimningdir fikrlashi yoki xatti-harakatiga ta’sir qilish kuchi.
words.example1: Parents have a big influence on their children.
words.example2: Social media has a strong influence on young people.
words.example2Translation: Ijtimoiy media yoshlarga kuchli ta’sir qiladi.
words.example3: His teacher influenced him to study medicine.
words.example3Translation: O‘qituvchisi unga tibbiyotni o‘qishga ta’sir qildi.
extraExamples: The book had a positive influence on her.
Peer influence is very strong in school.
She tries to influence others positively.
The influence of technology is everywhere.
Bad influence can lead to problems.
extraExampleTranslations: Iqlim o‘zgarishi ob-havo naqshlariga ta’sir qiladi.
U boshqalarga ijobiy ta’sir qilishga harakat qiladi.
Yomon ta’sir muammolarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: The global computer network providing information and communication.
words.definitionUz: Internet — ma’lumot va aloqa uchun xizmat qiluvchi global kompyuter tarmog‘i.
words.example1: The internet has changed the world.
words.example2: She spends a lot of time on the internet.
words.example3: You can find almost anything on the internet.
words.example3Translation: Internetda deyarli hamma narsani topish mumkin.
extraExamples: The internet is very useful for studying.
Fast internet is important for work.
Many people use the internet every day.
The internet connects people around the world.
He learned English on the internet.
Internet access is limited in rural areas.
Social media is part of the internet.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar har kuni internetdan foydalanadi.
U ingliz tilini internet orqali o‘rgandi.

words.definition: The use of science and knowledge to create tools and machines.
words.definitionUz: Texnologiya — ilm-fan va bilimdan foydalanib asbob va mashinalar yaratish.
words.example1: Technology is developing very fast.
extraExamples: Medical technology has improved a lot.
He is interested in new technology.
Technology education is important in schools.
Too much technology can cause stress.
extraExampleTranslations: Texnologiya ko‘p muammolarni hal qilishi mumkin.
Juda ko‘p texnologiya stressga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: A set of rules or steps to solve a problem, especially in computers.
words.definitionUz: Algoritm — muammoni hal qilish uchun qoidalar yoki bosqichlar to‘plami, ayniqsa kompyuterlarda.
words.example1: Social media uses algorithms to show content.
words.example1Translation: Ijtimoiy media kontentni ko‘rsatish uchun algoritmlardan foydalanadi.
words.example2: He learned how to write algorithms.
extraExamples: Algorithms are used in many apps.
Understanding algorithms is important in programming.
The search algorithm is very powerful.
Improving the algorithm made the app faster.
extraExampleTranslations: Algoritmlar avtomatik qaror qabul qilishi mumkin.

words.definition: An organized collection of information stored on a computer.
words.definitionUz: Ma’lumotlar bazasi — kompyuterda tartiblangan holda saqlanadigan ma’lumotlar to‘plami.
words.example1: The company has a large customer database.
words.example1Translation: Kompaniyada katta mijozlar ma’lumotlar bazasi bor.
words.example2: She works with databases every day.
words.example2Translation: U har kuni ma’lumotlar bazasi bilan ishlaydi.
extraExamples: Databases are essential for modern businesses.
He learned how to manage databases.
The school keeps student information in a database.
Protecting the database is very important.
She designed a new database system.
The database contains thousands of records.
extraExampleTranslations: Ma’lumotlar bazalari zamonaviy biznes uchun zarur.
Onlayn savdo katta ma’lumotlar bazalaridan foydalanadi.
Ma’lumotlar bazasini himoya qilish juda muhim.
U yangi ma’lumotlar bazasi tizimini loyihalashtirdi.

words.definition: The way a user interacts with a computer program or device.
words.definitionUz: Interfeys — foydalanuvchining kompyuter dasturi yoki qurilma bilan muloqot qilish usuli.
words.example1: The app has a user-friendly interface.
words.example2: The new interface is much better.
words.example3: She is designing the user interface.
extraExamples: The interface is simple and clean.
Improving the interface increases user satisfaction.
The software has a graphical interface.
He is an expert in user interface design.
A good interface makes technology accessible.
extraExampleTranslations: U foydalanuvchi interfeysi dizayni bo‘yicha mutaxassis.

words.definition: Easy and pleasant to use.
words.definitionUz: Foydalanuvchiga qulay — ishlatish oson va yoqimli.
words.example1: The app is very user-friendly.
words.example2: This software is designed to be user-friendly.
words.example2Translation: Bu dastur foydalanuvchiga qulay bo‘lishi uchun yaratilgan.
words.example3: A user-friendly website attracts more visitors.
words.example3Translation: Foydalanuvchiga qulay veb-sayt ko‘proq tashrif buyuruvchilarni jalb qiladi.
extraExamples: The new system is more user-friendly.
The interface is simple and user-friendly.
The instructions are clear and user-friendly.

words.definition: An important discovery or achievement.
words.definitionUz: Yutuq — muhim kashfiyot yoki erishilgan natija.
words.example1: Scientists made a breakthrough in medicine.
words.example2: This is a major breakthrough in technology.
words.example3: The breakthrough will help many people.
words.example3Translation: Bu yutuq ko‘p odamlarga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Breakthroughs happen after years of research.
This app is a breakthrough in education.
The company announced a new breakthrough.
extraExampleTranslations: Yutuqlar yillar tadqiqotdan keyin sodir bo‘ladi.

words.definition: The process of converting information into digital form.
words.definitionUz: Raqamlashtirish — ma’lumotlarni raqamli shaklga o‘tkazish jarayoni.
words.example1: Digitalization is changing many industries.
extraExamples: The process of digitalization is ongoing.
extraExampleTranslations: Raqamlashtirish qog‘oz ishlarini kamaytirishga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The use of machines to do work automatically.
words.definitionUz: Avtomatlashtirish — mashinalar yordamida ishni avtomatik bajarish.
words.example1: Automation is increasing in factories.
words.example2: The company introduced automation to save time.
words.example2Translation: Kompaniya vaqtni tejash uchun avtomatlashtirishni joriy etdi.
words.example3Translation: Avtomatlashtirish ba’zi ish o‘rinlarini almashtirishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The benefits of automation are significant.
The future will have more automation.

words.definition: The state of being healthy, happy, and comfortable.
words.definitionUz: Farovonlik — sog‘lom, baxtli va qulay holatda bo‘lish.
words.example1: Mental well-being is very important.
words.example3: The company cares about employee well-being.
extraExamples: Well-being includes physical and mental health.
Promoting well-being at work is a priority.
A good lifestyle supports overall well-being.
extraExampleTranslations: Farovonlik jismoniy va ruhiy salomatlikni o‘z ichiga oladi.
Yaxshi turmush tarzi umumiy farovonlikni qo‘llab-quvvatlaydi.

words.definition: The state of a person’s emotional and psychological well-being.
words.definitionUz: Ruhiy salomatlik — odamning his-tuyg‘u va psixologik farovonligi holati.
words.example1: Mental health is as important as physical health.
words.example1Translation: Ruhiy salomatlik jismoniy salomatlik kabi muhim.
words.example2: She takes care of her mental health.
words.example3: Talking about mental health helps reduce stigma.
words.example3Translation: Ruhiy salomatlik haqida gapirish stigma kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Many people need support for mental health.
Good sleep is important for mental health.
The company offers mental health days.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p odamlar ruhiy salomatlik uchun yordamga muhtoj.
Yaxshi uyqu ruhiy salomatlik uchun muhim.
Kompaniya ruhiy salomatlik kunlarini taklif qiladi.

words.definition: The state of being physically healthy and strong.
words.definitionUz: Jismoniy chiniqish — jismoniy jihatdan sog‘lom va kuchli bo‘lish holati.
words.example1: Physical fitness is important for overall health.
words.example1Translation: Jismoniy chiniqish umumiy salomatlik uchun muhim.
extraExamples: He joined a gym for better physical fitness.
Physical fitness tests are done in the army.
Nutrition is key to physical fitness.
Physical fitness improves quality of life.
extraExampleTranslations: Jismoniy chiniqish stressni kamaytirishga yordam beradi.
U yaxshiroq jismoniy chiniqish uchun sport zaliga qo‘shildi.

words.definition: The process of getting the right food for health.
words.definitionUz: Ovqatlanish — salomatlik uchun to‘g‘ri ovqat olish jarayoni.
words.example1: Good nutrition is essential for growth.
extraExamples: The doctor gave advice on nutrition.
Proper nutrition is important for athletes.
Nutrition labels help make better choices.
Poor nutrition can cause health problems.
extraExampleTranslations: Ovqatlanish yorliqlari yaxshiroq tanlov qilishga yordam beradi.
Yomon ovqatlanish sog‘liq muammolariga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: A diet with the right amounts of different nutrients.
words.definitionUz: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish — turli ozuqa moddalarining to‘g‘ri miqdorda bo‘lgan parhez.
words.example1: A balanced diet includes fruits and vegetables.
words.example1Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish meva va sabzavotlarni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example2: Eating a balanced diet helps maintain health.
words.example2Translation: Muvozanatli ovqatlanish salomatlikni saqlashga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Children need a balanced diet for growth.
She plans her meals for a balanced diet.
Fast food is rarely part of a balanced diet.
A balanced diet reduces disease risk.
Maintaining a balanced diet is important.
extraExampleTranslations: Bolalar o‘sish uchun muvozanatli ovqatlanishga muhtoj.
U muvozanatli ovqatlanish uchun ovqatlarini rejalashtiradi.
Tez ovqat muvozanatli ovqatlanishning kamdan-kam qismi.
Ovqatlanish mutaxassislari muvozanatli ovqatlanish haqida o‘rgatishadi.

words.definition: Engaged in physical activity or doing things.
words.definitionUz: Faol — jismoniy harakat bilan shug‘ullanadigan yoki ish bilan band.
words.example1: She leads an active lifestyle.
words.example1Translation: U faol turmush tarzini olib boradi.
words.example2: Children should be active every day.
words.example2Translation: Bolalar har kuni faol bo‘lishlari kerak.
words.example3: He is very active in sports.
extraExamples: An active life keeps you healthy.
The club is active in the community.
She takes an active role in the project.
Be active instead of sitting all day.
extraExampleTranslations: Kun bo‘yi o‘tirish o‘rniga faol bo‘ling.

words.definition: A way of living that includes healthy habits.
words.definitionUz: Sog‘lom turmush tarzi — sog‘lom odatlarni o‘z ichiga olgan hayot tarzi.
words.example1: A healthy lifestyle includes exercise and good food.
words.example1Translation: Sog‘lom turmush tarzi mashq va yaxshi ovqatni o‘z ichiga oladi.
words.example2Translation: U sog‘lom turmush tarzini qabul qildi.
words.example3Translation: Sog‘lom turmush tarzi kasallik xavfini kamaytiradi.
extraExamples: Many books teach about healthy lifestyle.
He changed to a healthy lifestyle.
Healthy lifestyle is important for longevity.
Maintaining a healthy lifestyle takes effort.
A healthy lifestyle includes enough sleep.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p kitoblar sog‘lom turmush tarzi haqida o‘rgatadi.
Sog‘lom turmush tarzi uzoq umr ko‘rish uchun muhim.
Sog‘lom turmush tarzini saqlash kuch talab qiladi.
Sog‘lom turmush tarzi yetarli uyquni o‘z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: An illness that affects the body or mind.
words.definitionUz: Kasallik — tanani yoki aqlni ta’sir qiladigan kasallik.
words.example1: Heart disease is common.
words.example3: Prevention is better than treating disease.
extraExampleTranslations: Turmush tarzi kasallik xavfiga ta’sir qiladi.
Surunkali kasalliklar uzoq muddatli boshqaruvni talab qiladi.

words.definition: Actions taken to stop something bad from happening.
words.definitionUz: Oldini olish — yomon narsaning sodir bo‘lishini to‘xtatish uchun qilinadigan harakatlar.
words.example1: Prevention is better than cure.
words.example2Translation: Kasallikning oldini olish emlashni o‘z ichiga oladi.
extraExamples: She focuses on prevention rather than treatment.
Crime prevention strategies are in place.
extraExampleTranslations: U davolashdan ko‘ra oldini olishga e’tibor beradi.
Oldini olish pul va hayot saqlaydi.
Aksiya baxtsiz hodisalarning oldini olishni rag‘batlantiradi.

words.definition: A state of mental or emotional tension.
words.definitionUz: Stress — ruhiy yoki his-tuyg‘u zo‘riqishi holati.
words.example1: Work stress is common.
words.example2: She learned how to manage stress.
words.example3: Too much stress is bad for health.
words.example3Translation: Juda ko‘p stress salomatlik uchun zararli.
extraExamples: He is under a lot of stress.
Meditation is good for stress relief.
extraExampleTranslations: Stress bosh og‘rig‘iga olib kelishi mumkin.
Meditatsiya stressni bartaraf etish uchun yaxshi.
Moliyaviy stress ko‘p oilalarga ta’sir qiladi.

words.definition: A feeling of worry or nervousness.
words.definitionUz: Tashvish — xavotir yoki asabiylashish hissi.
words.example1: She suffers from anxiety.
words.example2Translation: Tashvish kundalik hayotga ta’sir qilishi mumkin.
words.example3Translation: Chuqur nafas olish tashvishga yordam beradi.
extraExamples: Test anxiety is common among students.
Social anxiety makes meeting people difficult.
Managing anxiety is important for well-being.
extraExampleTranslations: Imtihon tashvishi talabalar orasida keng tarqalgan.
U yig‘ilish oldidan xavotir his qiladi.
Tashvish buzilishlari professional yordam talab qiladi.
Ijtimoiy tashvish odamlar bilan uchrashishni qiyinlashtiradi.
Tashvish jismoniy belgilarga olib kelishi mumkin.

words.definition: A mental condition with persistent sadness and loss of interest.
words.definitionUz: Depressiya — doimiy qayg‘u va qiziqishni yo‘qotish bilan kechadigan ruhiy holat.
words.example1: She is being treated for depression.
words.example3: Seeking help for depression is important.
extraExamples: Exercise can help with mild depression.
He talks openly about his depression.
Professional support is needed for depression.
extraExampleTranslations: Mashqlar engil depressiyaga yordam berishi mumkin.
U o‘z depressiyasi haqida ochiq gapiradi.

words.definition: A hopeful and optimistic way of thinking.
words.definitionUz: Ijobiy munosabat — umidvor va optimistik fikrlash usuli.
words.example1: A positive attitude helps overcome challenges.
words.example1Translation: Ijobiy munosabat qiyinchiliklarni yengishga yordam beradi.
words.example2: She always has a positive attitude.
words.example3: Maintaining a positive attitude is important.
extraExamples: Positive attitude leads to better results.
He changed his positive attitude after the talk.
A positive attitude improves mental health.
She faced difficulties with positive attitude.
Positive attitude helps in difficult times.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijobiy munosabat yaxshiroq natijalarga olib keladi.
U suhbatdan keyin ijobiy munosabatini o‘zgartirdi.
U qiyinchiliklarga ijobiy munosabat bilan qaradi.
Ijobiy munosabat qiyin paytlarda yordam beradi.

words.definition: A strong need to do something regularly, often harmful.
words.definitionUz: Qaramlik — biror narsani muntazam ravishda qilishga kuchli ehtiyoj, ko‘pincha zararli.
words.example1: He is fighting smartphone addiction.
words.example2: Addiction can be very difficult to overcome.
words.example2Translation: Qaramlikni yengish juda qiyin bo‘lishi mumkin.
words.example3: Smoking addiction is harmful to health.
extraExamples: Drug addiction is a serious problem.
Social media addiction affects many young people.
She overcame her addiction with support.
extraExampleTranslations: Ijtimoiy mediaga qaramlik ko‘p yoshlarga ta’sir qiladi.
Qaramlikni davolash markazlari odamlarga yordam beradi.

words.definition: The state of being physically fit and healthy.
words.definitionUz: Chiniqish — jismoniy jihatdan chiniqqan va sog‘lom bo‘lish holati.
words.example1: She goes to the gym for fitness.
words.example1Translation: U chiniqish uchun sport zaliga boradi.
words.example2: Fitness is important for a long life.
words.example2Translation: Chiniqish uzoq umr ko‘rish uchun muhim.
extraExamples: Fitness is part of a healthy lifestyle.
The fitness center is open 24 hours.
Improving fitness takes time and effort.
extraExampleTranslations: Chiniqish ilovalari natijani kuzatishga yordam beradi.
Chiniqish sog‘lom turmush tarzining bir qismi.
Chiniqishni yaxshilash vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.
