words.example1: Divide the cake into eight pieces.
words.example2: The teacher divided the class into groups.
extraExamples: They divided the work between them.
The country is divided into regions.
She divided her time between work and family.
extraExampleTranslations: U vaqtini ish va oila o'rtasida bo'ldi.

words.definition: To make it possible for someone to do something.
words.definitionUz: Imkoniyat yaratmoq — birovga biror narsani qilish imkonini berish.
words.example1: This tool enables you to work faster.
words.example1Translation: Bu vosita tezroq ishlashingizga imkoniyat yaratadi.
words.example2: Education enables people to get better jobs.
words.example2Translation: Ta'lim odamlarga yaxshiroq ish topishga imkoniyat yaratadi.
words.example3: The scholarship enabled her to study abroad.
words.example3Translation: Stipendiya unga chet elda o'qishga imkoniyat yaratdi.
extraExamples: The new law enables small businesses.
It enables users to save time.
extraExampleTranslations: Yangi qonun kichik bizneslarga imkoniyat yaratadi.
Bu funksiya qorong'u rejimni yoqishga imkon beradi.
Uning yordami uning muvaffaqiyatiga imkoniyat yaratdi.
Yaxshi yo'llar tezroq sayohatga imkoniyat yaratadi.
Bu foydalanuvchilarga vaqtni tejashga imkon beradi.

words.definition: To order someone not to do something.
words.definitionUz: Taqiqlamoq — birovga biror narsani qilmaslikni buyurish.
words.example1: Smoking is forbidden here.
words.example2: Her parents forbid her from going out alone.
words.example2Translation: Ota-onasi unga yolg'iz tashqariga chiqishni taqiqlagan.
words.example3: The law forbids driving after drinking.
extraExamples: Photography is forbidden in the museum.
The teacher forbade talking during the test.
It is forbidden to enter this area.
His doctor forbade him from eating sweets.
They forbid the use of phones in class.
The sign says "No entry - strictly forbidden".
extraExampleTranslations: Yozuvda "Kirish taqiqlangan - qat'iyan man qilinadi" deb yozilgan.

words.definition: To make someone do something they do not want to do.
words.definitionUz: Majburlamoq — birovni xohlamagan ishni qilishga majbur qilish.
words.example1: Don't force me to do it.
words.example2: The bad weather forced us to stay home.
words.example2Translation: Yomon ob-havo bizni uyda qolishga majbur qildi.
extraExamples: The company forced him to resign.
They forced their way through the crowd.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'zini tabassum qilishga majbur qildi.
Vaziyat qaror qabul qilishga majbur qildi.
Kompaniya uni ishdan bo'shashga majbur qildi.
Iqtisodiy muammolar ko'p o'zgarishlarga majbur qildi.

words.definition: To get or obtain something you want.
words.definitionUz: Qo'lga kiritmoq — xohlagan narsangizni olish yoki erishish.
words.example1: She gained a lot of experience.
words.example3: He gained confidence after the speech.
words.example3Translation: U nutqdan keyin ishonchni qo'lga kiritdi.
extraExamples: She gained weight during the holiday.
They gained the support of the public.
She gained respect from her colleagues.
extraExampleTranslations: U dam olish paytida vazn oldi.

words.definition: To bring things or people together in one place.
words.definitionUz: Yig'moq — narsalar yoki odamlarni bir joyga to'plash.
words.example1: We gathered information for the report.

words.definition: To deal with or control a situation or object.
words.definitionUz: Boshqarmoq — vaziyat yoki ob'ekt bilan ishlash yoki uni nazorat qilish.
words.example1: She can handle the problem.
extraExamples: The teacher handled the class well.
Be careful how you handle this.

words.definition: To cause damage or injury to someone or something.
words.definitionUz: Zarar yetkazmoq — birovga yoki biror narsaga shikast yetkazish.
words.example1: Smoking harms your health.
extraExamples: Too much sun can harm your skin.
This decision could harm the company.
Don't do anything to harm yourself.
extraExampleTranslations: Quyoshning haddan tashqari ta'siri teringizga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
U hech qachon hech kimga zarar yetkazmaydi.
Bu qaror kompaniyaga zarar yetkazishi mumkin.
O'zingizga zarar yetkazadigan hech narsa qilmang.

words.definition: To recognize or say who or what someone or something is.
words.definitionUz: Aniqlamoq — kim yoki nima ekanligini tanib olish yoki aytish.
words.example1: Can you identify this person?
words.example3: She identified the thief in the photo.
extraExamples: Identify the main idea of the text.
They identified the cause of the accident.
She identified herself as the owner.
extraExampleTranslations: O'z kuchli va zaif tomonlaringizni aniqlang.

words.definition: To plan or mean to do something
words.definitionUz: Niyat qilmoq — biror ishni bajarishni rejalashtirish yoki maqsad qilish.
words.example1: I intend to visit my family.
words.example2: What do you intend to do?
words.example3Translation: U chet elda o'qishni niyat qilgan.
extraExamples: They intend to start a new business.
I didn't intend to hurt your feelings.
extraExampleTranslations: Ular yangi biznes boshlashni niyat qilishgan.
Men sizning his-tuyg'ularingizni og'ritishni niyat qilmaganman.

words.definition: To include or affect someone or something
words.definitionUz: Jalb qilmoq — biror ishga odamni qo'shish yoki unga ta'sir qilish.
words.example1: The project will involve many people.
extraExamples: The job involves traveling a lot.
This decision will involve some risks.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish ko'p sayohat qilishni o'z ichiga oladi.
Bu qaror ba'zi xavflarni o'z ichiga oladi.

words.definition: To form an opinion about something
words.definitionUz: Baholamoq — biror narsaga o'z fikrini bildirish yoki hukm chiqarish.
words.example1: Don't judge a book by its cover.
words.example2: The teacher will judge the work.
extraExamples: It is not fair to judge people quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Odamlar haqida tez hukm chiqarish adolatli emas.

words.definition: To keep something in good condition
words.definitionUz: Saqlab qolmoq — biror narsani yaxshi holatda ushlab turish.
words.example1: You must maintain your car.
extraExamples: He maintained his position in the team.
extraExampleTranslations: U jamoada o'z o'rnini saqlab qoldi.

words.definition: To get or achieve something
words.definitionUz: Olmoq — biror narsaga erishish yoki uni qo'lga kiritish.
words.example1: You can obtain a visa easily.
extraExamples: It is hard to obtain tickets.

words.definition: To happen or take place
words.definitionUz: Sodir bo'lmoq — biror voqea yuz berishi.
words.example1: When did it occur?
words.example2Translation: Baxtsiz hodisalar hamma joyda sodir bo'lishi mumkin.
extraExamples: The meeting will occur next week.

words.definition: To work or function
words.definitionUz: Ishlamoq — mashina yoki tizimning faoliyat yuritishi.
words.example1: The machine operates well.

words.definition: To do an action or show something
words.definitionUz: Bajarmoq — biror vazifani bajarish yoki sahnada chiqish qilish.
words.example1: She will perform a song.

words.definition: To make or create something
words.definitionUz: Ishlab chiqarmoq — mahsulot yoki natija yaratish.
words.example1: Factories produce cars.
extraExamples: The company produces high quality goods.
extraExampleTranslations: Kompaniya yuqori sifatli tovarlar ishlab chiqaradi.

words.definition: To show that something is true
words.definitionUz: Isbotlamoq — biror narsaning haqiqatligini dalillar bilan ko'rsatish.
words.example1: Can you prove it?
words.example3: Time will prove who is right.
extraExamples: She proved herself as a leader.

words.definition: To make information available to the public
words.definitionUz: Nashr qilmoq — kitob, maqola yoki xabarni ommaga chiqarish.
words.example1: The book will be published soon.
extraExamples: He hopes to publish his research.
extraExampleTranslations: U tadqiqotini nashr qilishga umid qiladi.

words.definition: To suggest something as good
words.definitionUz: Tavsiya qilmoq — biror narsani yaxshi deb maslahat berish.
words.example1: I recommend this restaurant.
extraExamples: Can you recommend a good hotel?
extraExampleTranslations: Men bu filumni juda tavsiya qilaman.

words.definition: To mention or direct attention to something
words.definitionUz: Havola qilmoq — biror narsaga ishora qilish yoki murojaat qilish.
words.example1: Please refer to the manual.
words.example3: I refer you to the previous page.
extraExamples: The teacher referred to an old story.
Refer to the dictionary for meaning.

words.definition: To connect or tell a story
words.definitionUz: Bog'lamoq — ikki narsani bir-biriga bog'lash yoki voqeani aytib berish.
words.example1: I can relate to your story.
words.example2: This relates to the main topic.
extraExamples: The two events are closely related.
extraExampleTranslations: Nima sodir bo'lganini aytib bera olasizmi?

words.definition: To let something go or make it public
words.definitionUz: Chiqarmoq — biror narsani ozod qilish yoki ommaga taqdim etish.
words.example1: They will release the new song.
extraExamples: The company released a new product.

words.definition: To depend on someone or something
words.definitionUz: Ishonmoq — biror kishi yoki narsaga tayanish.
words.example1: You can rely on me.
extraExamples: She relies on her friends for support.

words.definition: To stay in the same place or condition
words.definitionUz: Qolmoq — bir joyda yoki holatda qolish.
words.example1: Please remain seated.

words.definition: To take something away
words.definitionUz: Olib tashlamoq — biror narsani joyidan ko'chirish yoki yo'q qilish.
words.example1: Remove your shoes.
extraExamples: Please remove your name from the list.

words.definition: To stand for or act on behalf of
words.definitionUz: Vakillik qilmoq — biror narsani ifodalash yoki guruh nomidan harakat qilish.
words.example1: She represents our school.
extraExamples: He represents the company in meetings.
extraExampleTranslations: U yig'ilishlarda kompaniya nomidan chiqish qiladi.

words.definition: To politely ask for something
words.definitionUz: So'ramoq — biror narsani muloyimlik bilan talab qilish.
words.example1: I request your help.
extraExamples: Visitors are requested to be quiet.

words.definition: To limit something
words.definitionUz: Cheklamoq — biror narsaning miqdori yoki imkoniyatini cheklash.
words.example1: They restrict access.
extraExamples: We must restrict the use of water.

words.definition: To expose to danger
words.definitionUz: Xavf solmoq — biror narsani xavf ostiga qo'yish.
words.example1: Don't risk your life.
words.example2Translation: U hamma narsani xavf ostiga qo'ydi.
words.example3: It is not worth the risk.
extraExamples: She risked her job to help others.
extraExampleTranslations: U boshqalarga yordam berish uchun ishini xavf ostiga qo'ydi.

words.definition: To make someone happy or fulfill a need
words.definitionUz: Qoniqtirmoq — biror ehtiyojni to'liq bajarish yoki odamni mamnun qilish.
words.example1: This will satisfy your needs.
words.example3: I am satisfied with the result.
extraExamples: The teacher was satisfied with the answers.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech narsa uning qiziqishini qondira olmaydi.

words.definition: To look for something carefully
words.definitionUz: Qidirmoq — biror narsani sinchkovlik bilan izlash.
words.example1: Search for the keys.
extraExamples: Police are searching for the missing child.
She searched her bag for the phone.

words.definition: To choose carefully
words.definitionUz: Tanlamoq — bir necha variantdan eng yaxshisini tanlash.
words.example1: Select the correct answer.

words.definition: To divide or keep apart
words.definitionUz: Ajratmoq — ikki narsani bir-biridan ajratish.
words.example1: Separate the papers.
extraExamples: The wall separates the two gardens.
We should separate fact from opinion.

words.definition: To provide a service or food
words.definitionUz: Xizmat qilmoq — mijozlarga xizmat ko'rsatish yoki ovqat berish.
words.example1: The waiter served the food.
words.example3Translation: Bu asbob ko'p maqsadlarga xizmat qiladi.

words.definition: To become calm or establish a home
words.definitionUz: Joylashmoq — yangi joyga ko'chib o'tish yoki tinchlanish.
words.example1: They settled in a new city.
extraExamples: We need to settle the problem.

words.definition: To extend over an area
words.definitionUz: Tarqalmoq — biror narsaning keng maydonga yoyilishi.
words.example1: The news spread quickly.
extraExamples: She spread the map on the table.

words.definition: To express something clearly
words.definitionUz: Bayon qilmoq — fikr yoki ma'lumotni aniq aytish.
words.example1: Please state your name.
extraExamples: She stated that she was happy.

words.definition: To make something stronger
words.definitionUz: Kuchaytirmoq — biror narsani kuchliroq qilish.
words.example1: Exercise strengthens muscles.
extraExamples: The wind strengthened during the night.

words.definition: To experience pain or difficulty
words.definitionUz: Azob chekmoq — og'riq yoki qiyinchilikni boshdan kechirish.
words.example1: He suffered from a cold.

words.definition: To provide something needed
words.definitionUz: Ta'minlamoq — kerakli narsalarni yetkazib berish.
words.example1: The shop supplies food.
extraExamples: We need to supply fresh water.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz toza suv bilan ta'minlashimiz kerak.

words.definition: To deal with or give medical care
words.definitionUz: Davolamoq — kasallikni davolash yoki biror narsaga munosabat bildirish.
words.example1: The doctor treated the patient.
extraExampleTranslations: U bizni kechki ovqatga taklif qildi.

words.definition: To believe someone is honest
words.definitionUz: Ishonmoq — biror kishining halol ekanligiga ishonish.
words.example1: I trust you.

words.definition: To be different or change
words.definitionUz: Farqlanmoq — bir-biridan farq qilish yoki o'zgarish.
words.example1: Prices vary from shop to shop.

words.definition: To put something new in place of another
words.definitionUz: Almashtirmoq — eski narsani yangisi bilan almashtirish.
words.example1: Replace the battery.
extraExamples: The company replaced all old machines.
Can you replace me for the meeting?

words.definition: To achieve what you want
words.definitionUz: Muvaffaqiyat qozonmoq — maqsadga erishish.
words.example1: You will succeed if you try.

words.definition: To examine something carefully
words.definitionUz: Tekshirmoq — biror voqea yoki masalani chuqur o'rganish.
words.example1: Police will investigate the case.

words.definition: To show how something works
words.definitionUz: Ko'rsatmoq — biror narsani amalda namoyish qilish.
words.example1: Please demonstrate the process.

words.definition: To make something larger in size, amount, or scope.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani hajmi, miqdori yoki doirasini kattalashtirmoq.
words.example1: The company plans to expand its business to other cities.
words.example2: The city is expanding rapidly with new buildings.
words.example2Translation: Shahar yangi binolar bilan tez sur'atlar bilan kengaymoqda.
words.example3: You should expand your vocabulary by reading more.
words.example3Translation: Ko'proq o'qish orqali so'z boyligingizni kengaytiring.
extraExamples: The balloon expanded when we blew air into it.
They want to expand the school library.
Our knowledge expands when we travel.
The market is expanding every year.

words.definition: To make something smaller in size, amount, or number.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning hajmi, miqdori yoki sonini kichiklashtirmoq.
words.example1: We need to decrease our spending this month.
words.example2: The temperature decreased suddenly in the evening.
words.example3: The company decreased the price to attract more customers.
words.example3Translation: Kompaniya ko'proq mijoz jalb qilish uchun narxni pasaytirdi.
extraExamples: Crime rates have decreased in the city.
She decreased the volume of the music.
Production decreased due to the strike.
The population is decreasing in some villages.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish tashlash tufayli ishlab chiqarish kamaydi.

words.definition: To go up or increase.
words.definitionUz: Yuqoriga chiqmoq yoki ortmoq.
words.example1: Prices continue to rise every year.
words.example1Translation: Narxlar har yili ko'tarilishda davom etmoqda.
words.example2: The sun rises in the east.
words.example3: She rose from her chair to greet the guests.
words.example3Translation: U mehmonlarni kutib olish uchun o'rindig'idan turdi.
extraExamples: The river level rises after heavy rain.
extraExampleTranslations: Kuchli yomg'irdan keyin daryo suvi ko'tariladi.

words.definition: To become bigger or taller, or to increase.
words.definitionUz: Kattalashmoq, balandlashmoq yoki ko'paymoq.
words.example1: The tree is growing very fast.
words.example2: Her business grew from a small shop to a big company.
words.example2Translation: Uning biznesi kichik do'kondan katta kompaniyaga o'sdi.
words.example3: Children grow quickly in their first years.
extraExamples: The population of the city is growing.
She grew up in a small village.
Interest in the topic is growing.
We grew vegetables in our garden.

words.definition: To compare two things to show their differences.
words.definitionUz: Ikki narsani solishtirib, farqlarini ko'rsatmoq.
words.example1: The teacher contrasted the two cultures in class.
words.example2: Her new painting contrasts sharply with her old style.
words.example2Translation: Uning yangi rasmi eski uslubidan keskin farq qiladi.
words.example3: We can contrast city life with village life.
words.example3Translation: Biz shahar hayotini qishloq hayoti bilan qiyoslashimiz mumkin.
extraExamples: The book contrasts good and evil.
His words contrast with his actions.
They contrasted the prices of different brands.

words.definition: To give a short version of the main points.
words.definitionUz: Asosiy fikrlarni qisqa shaklda aytib berish.
words.example1: Please summarise the article in your own words.
words.example1Translation: Iltimos, maqolani o'z so'zlaringiz bilan qisqacha bayon qiling.
words.example2: The teacher summarised the lesson at the end.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchi dars oxirida mavzuni qisqacha takrorladi.
words.example3: Can you summarise what happened yesterday?
words.example3Translation: Kecha nima bo'lganini qisqacha aytib bera olasizmi?
extraExamples: She summarised the main ideas of the book.
It is important to summarise key points.
He summarised the meeting in one paragraph.
extraExampleTranslations: U kitobning asosiy g'oyalarini qisqacha bayon qildi.
Asosiy fikrlarni qisqacha aytib berish muhim.
U yig'ilishni bitta paragrafda qisqacha yozdi.

words.definition: To reach a decision or end something.
words.definitionUz: Qarorga kelmoq yoki biror narsani yakunlamoq.
words.example1: We concluded that the plan was too expensive.
words.example1Translation: Biz reja juda qimmat degan xulosaga keldik.
words.example3: After thinking carefully, she concluded it was the right choice.
words.example3Translation: Yaxshilab o'ylab ko'rgach, u bu to'g'ri tanlov ekanligiga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: What do you conclude from these results?
I concluded my speech with thanks.
extraExampleTranslations: Men nutqimni rahmat aytish bilan yakunladim.

words.definition: To guess the size, amount, or value of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning hajmi, miqdori yoki qiymatini taxmin qilmoq.
words.example1: They estimated the cost of the project at $50,000.
words.example1Translation: Ular loyiha narxini 50 ming dollarga taxmin qilishdi.
words.example2: I estimate it will take two hours to finish.
words.example2Translation: Men buni tugatishga ikki soat ketadi deb taxmin qilaman.
words.example3: The doctor estimated her recovery time.
words.example3Translation: Shifokor uning tuzalish muddatini taxmin qildi.
extraExamples: Experts estimate the number of visitors.
It is difficult to estimate the damage.
She estimated the crowd at about 500 people.
We need to estimate the time required.
extraExampleTranslations: Mutaxassislar tashrif buyuruvchilar sonini taxmin qilishadi.
U olomonni taxminan 500 kishi deb hisobladi.
Bizga kerakli vaqtni taxmin qilish kerak.

words.definition: To say what you think will happen in the future.
words.definitionUz: Kelajakda nima bo'lishini aytish.
words.example1: Scientists predict warmer weather in the future.
words.example1Translation: Olimlar kelajakda issiqroq ob-havo bo'lishini bashorat qilmoqda.
words.example2: I predict that she will win the competition.
words.example2Translation: Men u musobaqada g'olib bo'lishini bashorat qilaman.
words.example3Translation: Ob-havo ma'lumoti ertaga yomg'ir yog'ishini bashorat qilmoqda.
extraExamples: No one can predict the future exactly.
Economists predict a rise in prices.
It is hard to predict what will happen.
extraExampleTranslations: Hech kim kelajakni aniq bashorat qila olmaydi.

words.definition: To explain the meaning of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning ma'nosini tushuntirmoq.
words.example1: Can you interpret what this dream means?
words.example1Translation: Bu tush nimani anglatishini talqin qila olasizmi?
words.example2: The teacher interpreted the difficult poem for the students.
words.example2Translation: O'qituvchi talabalar uchun qiyin she'rni talqin qildi.
words.example3: We need someone to interpret between English and Uzbek.
words.example3Translation: Ingliz va o'zbek tillari o'rtasida tarjimon kerak.
extraExamples: How do you interpret his silence?
The results can be interpreted in many ways.
He is good at interpreting body language.
extraExampleTranslations: Natijalarni turli yo'llar bilan talqin qilish mumkin.

words.definition: To give special importance to something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga alohida ahamiyat berish.
words.example1: The teacher emphasised the importance of practice.
words.example2: She emphasised her point by repeating it.
extraExamples: He emphasised the need for teamwork.
I want to emphasise this fact.

words.definition: To draw attention to something important.
words.definitionUz: Muhim narsaga e'tiborni qaratmoq.
words.example1: The report highlights the main problems.
words.example3: She highlighted her achievements in the interview.
words.example3Translation: U suhbatda o'z yutuqlarini ajratib ko'rsatdi.
extraExamples: The teacher highlighted the key points.
The map highlights the tourist attractions.
He highlighted the benefits of the plan.
extraExampleTranslations: Xarita sayyohlik diqqatga sazovor joylarini belgilaydi.

words.definition: To not pay attention to something or someone.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa yoki odamga e'tibor bermay qo'yish.
words.example1: Don't ignore the warning signs.
words.example2: She tried to ignore the noise and focus on her work.
words.example2Translation: U shovqinlarga e'tibor bermay ishiга diqqatini qaratdi.
words.example3: He ignored my message and didn't reply.
words.example3Translation: U mening xabarimga e'tibor bermay javob bermadi.
extraExamples: Ignoring the problem will make it worse.
The teacher cannot ignore bad behavior.
We should not ignore climate change.
extraExampleTranslations: Muammoga e'tibor bermaslik uni yanada yomonlashtiradi.
O'qituvchi yomon xulq-atvorga e'tibor bera olmaydi.
Biz iqlim o'zgarishiga e'tibor bermasligimiz kerak emas.

words.definition: To successfully deal with a problem or difficulty.
words.definitionUz: Muammo yoki qiyinchilikni muvaffaqiyatli hal qilmoq.
words.example1: She overcame many difficulties to achieve her goal.
words.example1Translation: U maqsadiga erishish uchun ko'p qiyinchiliklarni yengdi.
words.example2: We must overcome our fear of failure.
extraExamples: It took time to overcome the language barrier.
She has overcome many challenges in life.
We need to overcome this problem together.
extraExampleTranslations: Til to'sig'ini yengish uchun vaqt kerak bo'ldi.

words.definition: To find a solution to a problem.
words.definitionUz: Muammoni yechimini topmoq.
words.example1: They resolved the conflict peacefully.
words.example1Translation: Ular mojaroni tinch yo'l bilan hal qilishdi.
words.example2: We need to resolve this issue as soon as possible.
words.example2Translation: Bu masalani imkon qadar tezroq hal qilishimiz kerak.
words.example3: She resolved to study harder next year.
words.example3Translation: U kelasi yili qattiqroq o'qishga qaror qildi.
extraExamples: The manager resolved the customer's complaint.
I resolved not to give up.

words.definition: To change something to fit new conditions.
words.definitionUz: Yangi sharoitlarga moslashish uchun o'zgartirmoq.
words.example1: It took time for her to adapt to the new school.
words.example1Translation: Unga yangi maktabga moslashish uchun vaqt kerak bo'ldi.
words.example3: We adapted the recipe for fewer people.
words.example3Translation: Biz retseptni kamroq odam uchun moslashtirdik.
extraExamples: He adapted quickly to the new job.
The book was adapted into a movie.
She is good at adapting to changes.

words.definition: To respond to something that happens.
words.definitionUz: Biror voqeaga javob qaytarmoq.
words.example1: How did she react to the news?
words.example1Translation: U bu xabarga qanday munosabat bildirdi?
words.example2: He reacted angrily to the criticism.
words.example2Translation: U tanqidga g'azab bilan javob berdi.
words.example3: The audience reacted with loud applause.
words.example3Translation: Tomoshabinlar qattiq olqish bilan javob berishdi.
extraExamples: The dog reacted to the loud noise.
She reacted positively to the suggestion.
How do people usually react in such situations?
extraExampleTranslations: Odamlar bunday vaziyatlarda odatda qanday javob berishadi?

words.definition: To change something completely.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani butunlay o'zgartirish.
words.example1: Technology has transformed our daily life.
words.example2: She transformed the old house into a beautiful home.
words.example2Translation: U eski uyni chiroyli uyga aylantirdi.
words.example3: The training program transformed his skills.
extraExamples: The city was transformed in just ten years.
He transformed from a shy boy to a confident leader.
The caterpillar transforms into a butterfly.
extraExampleTranslations: Shahar atigi o'n yilda butunlay o'zgardi.
U uyatchan boladan ishonchli rahbarga aylandi.

words.definition: To produce or create something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani yaratmoq yoki hosil qilmoq.
words.example1: This machine generates electricity.
words.example1Translation: Bu mashina elektr energiyasini hosil qiladi.
words.example2: The project will generate new jobs.
words.example3: The discussion generated many good ideas.
words.example3Translation: Muhokama ko'p yaxshi g'oyalarni hosil qildi.
extraExamples: The company generates a lot of profit.
We need to generate more income.
extraExampleTranslations: Quyosh panellari toza energiya hosil qiladi.
Biz ko'proq daromad hosil qilishimiz kerak.

words.definition: To start or create something that will last.
words.definitionUz: Uzoq muddatli narsani boshlamoq yoki yaratmoq.
words.example1: They established a new company last year.
words.example1Translation: Ular o'tgan yili yangi kompaniya ochishdi.
words.example3: We need to establish good relationships.
extraExamples: She established herself as a great singer.
The university established a new department.
It takes time to establish trust.
extraExampleTranslations: U o'zini zo'r qo'shiqchi sifatida ko'rsatdi.

words.definition: To watch or check something carefully over time.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsani vaqt davomida diqqat bilan kuzatib borish.
words.example1: Doctors monitor the patient's condition.
words.example2: The teacher monitors the students during the exam.
words.example3: We need to monitor our expenses closely.
words.example3Translation: Biz xarajatlarimizni diqqat bilan kuzatib borishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: Parents should monitor their children's internet use.
She monitors her blood pressure every day.
extraExampleTranslations: Ota-onalar farzandlarining internetdan foydalanishini kuzatishi kerak.
U har kuni qon bosimini o'lchab turadi.

words.definition: Without being affected by something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaga qaramay.
words.example1: Despite the rain, we went hiking.
words.example2Translation: U ko'p qiyinchiliklarga qaramay muvaffaqiyat qozondi.
words.example3: Despite being tired, he finished the work.
words.example3Translation: Charchagan bo'lishiga qaramay, u ishni tugatdi.
extraExamples: Despite the high price, many people bought it.
Despite his age, he runs every morning.
Despite the problems, the project was completed.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori narxiga qaramay, ko'p odam sotib oldi.
Yoshiga qaramay, u har kuni ertalab yuguradi.
Hamma narsaga qaramay, ular do'st bo'lib qolishdi.

words.definition: Without being prevented by something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa to'sqinlik qilmasdan.
words.example1: In spite of the bad weather, the match continued.
words.example1Translation: Yomon ob-havoga qaramay, o'yin davom etdi.
words.example2: In spite of his injury, he played well.
words.example3: In spite of everything, she smiled.
words.example3Translation: Hamma narsaga qaramay, u tabassum qildi.
extraExamples: In spite of the difficulties, they succeeded.
In spite of her fear, she jumped.
In spite of the cost, we bought it.
In spite of the warnings, he went alone.
extraExampleTranslations: Narxiga qaramay, biz uni sotib oldik.

words.definition: Used to show contrast between two facts.
words.definitionUz: Ikki fakt o'rtasidagi farqni ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She likes tea, whereas I prefer coffee.
words.example1Translation: U choyni yaxshi ko'radi, holbuki men qahvani afzal ko'raman.
words.example2: He is very tall, whereas his brother is short.
words.example2Translation: U juda baland, holbuki ukasi past bo'yli.
words.example3: Some people love winter, whereas others hate it.
words.example3Translation: Ba'zilar qishni yaxshi ko'radi, holbuki boshqalar undan nafratlanadi.
extraExamples: The old system was slow, whereas the new one is fast.
She is rich, whereas her sister is poor.
Some work hard, whereas others are lazy.
He speaks English fluently, whereas I struggle.
extraExampleTranslations: Eski tizim sekin edi, holbuki yangisi tez.
Ba'zilari qattiq ishlaydi, holbuki boshqalari yalqov.
U ingliz tilida ravon gapiradi, holbuki men qiynalaman.

words.definition: For that reason.
words.definitionUz: Shu sababli.
words.example1: It is raining, therefore we will stay inside.
words.example1Translation: Yomg'ir yog'moqda, shuning uchun biz ichkarida qolamiz.
words.example2: She studied hard, therefore she passed the exam.
words.example2Translation: U qattiq o'qidi, shuning uchun imtihondan o'tdi.
words.example3: He was late, therefore he missed the meeting.
words.example3Translation: U kech qoldi, shuning uchun yig'ilishni o'tkazib yubordi.
extraExamples: The price is high, therefore fewer people buy it.
Therefore, we decided to cancel the trip.
It is expensive, therefore I cannot afford it.
He is sick, therefore he cannot come.
extraExampleTranslations: Narx yuqori, shuning uchun kamroq odam sotib oladi.
Shuning uchun biz sayohatni bekor qilishga qaror qildik.
Bu qimmat, shuning uchun men uni sotib ola olmayman.
U kasal, shuning uchun kela olmaydi.

words.definition: As a result of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning natijasida.
words.example1: He worked hard, thus he succeeded.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq mehnat qildi, shu sababli muvaffaqiyat qozondi.
words.example2: The road was closed, thus we took another route.
words.example2Translation: Yo'l yopiq edi, shu sababli boshqa yo'ldan bordik.
words.example3: She saved money, thus she could buy a car.
words.example3Translation: U pul tejadi, shu sababli mashina sotib oldi.
extraExamples: The weather was bad, thus the game was canceled.
He forgot his keys, thus he couldn't enter.
She practiced daily, thus she improved quickly.
extraExampleTranslations: Ob-havo yomon edi, shu sababli o'yin bekor qilindi.
Shunday qilib, biz xulosa qilishimiz mumkinki...
U kalitlarini unutib qo'ydi, shu sababli kira olmadi.
U har kuni mashq qildi, shu sababli tez yaxshilandi.

words.definition: As a result of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsaning natijasida.
words.example1: He didn't study, consequently he failed the test.
words.example1Translation: U o'qimadi, natijada testdan o'ta olmadi.
words.example2: The factory closed, consequently many people lost jobs.
words.example2Translation: Zavod yopildi, natijada ko'p odamlar ishsiz qoldi.
words.example3: It rained heavily, consequently the match was postponed.
words.example3Translation: Kuchli yomg'ir yog'di, natijada o'yin kechiktirildi.
extraExamples: She was late, consequently she missed the train.
He spent too much, consequently he had no money left.
The team played badly, consequently they lost.
extraExampleTranslations: U kech qoldi, natijada poyezdni o'tkazib yubordi.
U juda ko'p pul sarfladi, natijada puli qolmadi.

words.definition: Because of something that happened.
words.definitionUz: Biror voqea tufayli.
words.example1: He studied hard. As a result, he got excellent grades.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq o'qidi. Natijada a'lo baholar oldi.
words.example2: There was heavy snow. As a result, schools were closed.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli qor yog'di. Natijada maktablar yopildi.
words.example3: She saved money. As a result, she could travel.
words.example3Translation: U pul tejadi. Natijada sayohat qila oldi.
extraExamples: As a result of the accident, traffic was blocked.
He didn't sleep well. As a result, he felt tired.
The price increased. As a result, sales decreased.
As a result, we decided to stay home.
extraExampleTranslations: Baxtsiz hodisa natijasida harakat to'xtab qoldi.
U yaxshi uxlamadi. Natijada charchaganini his qildi.
Natijada biz uyda qolishga qaror qildik.

words.definition: Used to add another piece of information.
words.definitionUz: Yana bir ma'lumot qo'shish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She speaks English. In addition, she knows French.
words.example1Translation: U ingliz tilida gaplashadi. Bundan tashqari, fransuz tilini ham biladi.
words.example2: The hotel is beautiful. In addition, it is very cheap.
words.example2Translation: Mehmonxona chiroyli. Bundan tashqari, juda arzon.
words.example3: In addition to studying, she works part-time.
words.example3Translation: O'qishdan tashqari, u yarim kunlik ishlaydi.
extraExamples: In addition, we need more time.
The food was delicious. In addition, the service was excellent.
He is smart. In addition, he is kind.
In addition to books, she bought a notebook.
extraExampleTranslations: Bundan tashqari, bizga ko'proq vaqt kerak.
Taom mazali edi. Bundan tashqari, xizmat ajoyib edi.
Kitoblardan tashqari, u daftar ham sotib oldi.

words.definition: Used to introduce additional information.
words.definitionUz: Qo'shimcha ma'lumot kiritish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: The house is big. Moreover, it has a nice garden.
words.example1Translation: Uy katta. Bundan tashqari, chiroyli bog'i bor.
words.example2: He is talented. Moreover, he works very hard.
words.example2Translation: U qobiliyatli. Bundan tashqari, juda qattiq ishlaydi.
words.example3: The plan is good. Moreover, it is cheap.
extraExamples: She is smart. Moreover, she is beautiful.
Moreover, we should consider the cost.
The book is interesting. Moreover, it is useful.
extraExampleTranslations: Bundan tashqari, biz xarajatlarni hisobga olishimiz kerak.

words.definition: In addition; moreover.
words.definitionUz: Qo'shimcha ravishda.
words.example1: The car is fast. Furthermore, it is safe.
words.example2: Furthermore, we need to consider the environment.
words.example2Translation: Bundan tashqari, atrof-muhitni hisobga olishimiz kerak.
words.example3: She is qualified. Furthermore, she has experience.
words.example3Translation: U malakali. Bundan tashqari, tajribasi bor.
extraExamples: The hotel is comfortable. Furthermore, it is near the beach.
Furthermore, I agree with your opinion.
It is expensive. Furthermore, it is not necessary.
extraExampleTranslations: Mehmonxona qulay. Bundan tashqari, plyajga yaqin.
Bundan tashqari, men sizning fikringiz bilan roziman.
Bu qimmat. Bundan tashqari, zarur ham emas.

words.definition: Used to introduce an opposite or different point.
words.definitionUz: Qarama-qarshi yoki boshqa fikrni kiritish uchun.
words.example1: The job pays well. On the other hand, it is very stressful.
words.example1Translation: Ish yaxshi maosh beradi. Boshqa tomondan, juda og'ir.
words.example2: It is expensive. On the other hand, it is high quality.
words.example2Translation: Bu qimmat. Boshqa tomondan, sifati yuqori.
words.example3: He is talented. On the other hand, he is lazy.
extraExamples: The city is exciting. On the other hand, it is noisy.
On the other hand, maybe we should wait.
It is beautiful. On the other hand, it is dangerous.
The plan is good. On the other hand, it takes too much time.
extraExampleTranslations: Reja yaxshi. Boshqa tomondan, juda ko'p vaqt oladi.

words.definition: Used to show clear difference.
words.definitionUz: Aniq farqni ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: She is tall. In contrast, her sister is short.
words.example1Translation: U baland bo'yli. Aksincha, singlisi past bo'yli.
words.example2: The north is cold. In contrast, the south is warm.
words.example3: He works hard. In contrast, his brother is lazy.
words.example3Translation: U qattiq ishlaydi. Aksincha, ukasi yalqov.
extraExamples: In contrast to last year, this year was better.
City life is busy. In contrast, village life is peaceful.
The old method is slow. In contrast, the new one is fast.
She is rich. In contrast, her friend is poor.
extraExampleTranslations: O'tgan yilga nisbatan bu yil yaxshiroq bo'ldi.
Shahar hayoti band. Aksincha, qishloq hayoti tinch.
Eski usul sekin. Aksincha, yangisi tez.

words.definition: In a similar way.
words.definitionUz: Shunga o'xshash tarzda.
words.example1: She likes reading. Similarly, her brother enjoys books.
words.example1Translation: U kitob o'qishni yaxshi ko'radi. Xuddi shunday, ukasi ham kitoblarni yoqtiradi.
words.example2: The weather was bad. Similarly, the next day was worse.
words.example2Translation: Ob-havo yomon edi. Xuddi shunday, keyingi kun yanada yomonroq bo'ldi.
words.example3: He speaks English well. Similarly, he is good at French.
words.example3Translation: U ingliz tilida yaxshi gapiradi. Xuddi shunday, fransuz tilida ham usta.
extraExamples: The first team won. Similarly, the second team played well.
She is kind. Similarly, her mother is very nice.
Prices are rising. Similarly, costs are increasing.
extraExampleTranslations: Xuddi shunday, biz boshqalarga yordam berishimiz kerak.
Birinchi jamoa g'olib chiqdi. Xuddi shunday, ikkinchi jamoa ham yaxshi o'ynadi.
U mehribon. Xuddi shunday, onasi ham juda yaxshi.
Narxlar oshmoqda. Xuddi shunday, xarajatlar ham ortmoqda.

words.definition: Because of something.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa sababli.
words.example1: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
words.example2: She was absent due to illness.
words.example3: Due to heavy traffic, we arrived late.
words.example3Translation: Og'ir tirbandlik tufayli biz kech yetib keldik.
extraExamples: Due to the strike, the factory stopped production.
The game was canceled due to rain.
Due to his hard work, he succeeded.
The road is closed due to construction.
extraExampleTranslations: Ish tashlash tufayli zavod ishlab chiqarishni to'xtatdi.
Qattiq mehnati tufayli u muvaffaqiyat qozondi.

words.definition: With the purpose of doing something.
words.definitionUz: Biror maqsadda.
words.example1: She studied hard in order to pass the exam.
words.example1Translation: U imtihondan o'tish uchun qattiq o'qidi.
words.example2: We saved money in order to buy a house.
words.example2Translation: Uy sotib olish uchun pul tejadik.
words.example3: He woke up early in order to catch the train.
extraExamples: In order to succeed, you must work hard.
She exercised daily in order to lose weight.
We need to hurry in order to arrive on time.
He learned English in order to get a better job.
extraExampleTranslations: Muvaffaqiyat qozonish uchun qattiq ishlashingiz kerak.
U vazn tashlash uchun har kuni sport bilan shug'ullandi.
Vaqtida yetib kelish uchun shoshilishimiz kerak.
U yaxshiroq ish topish uchun ingliz tilini o'rgandi.

words.definition: In order to make something possible.
words.definitionUz: Biror narsa amalga oshishi uchun.
words.example1: She spoke slowly so that everyone could understand.
words.example1Translation: U sekin gapirdi, shunday qilib hamma tushunishi mumkin edi.
words.example2: He saved money so that he could travel.
words.example2Translation: U sayohat qilish uchun pul tejadi.
words.example3: We left early so that we wouldn't be late.
extraExamples: Study hard so that you can pass the test.
She turned on the light so that she could read.
He practiced every day so that he could improve.
Please speak clearly so that I can hear you.
extraExampleTranslations: U har kuni mashq qildi, shunday qilib yaxshilanishi mumkin edi.
Iltimos, aniq gapiring, shunday qilib sizni eshitay.

words.definition: Despite the fact that.
words.definitionUz: Shunday bo'lishiga qaramay.
words.example1: Even though it was raining, we went out.
words.example1Translation: Garchi yomg'ir yog'ayotgan bo'lsa ham, biz tashqariga chiqdik.
words.example2: Even though he was tired, he finished the work.
words.example2Translation: Garchi charchagan bo'lsa ham, u ishni tugatdi.
words.example3: Even though it is expensive, I want to buy it.
words.example3Translation: Garchi qimmat bo'lsa ham, uni sotib olmoqchiman.
extraExamples: Even though she is young, she is very talented.
Even though I studied, I failed the test.
Even though it was difficult, we enjoyed it.
Even though he is rich, he is not happy.
extraExampleTranslations: Garchi yosh bo'lsa ham, u juda qobiliyatli.
Garchi o'qigan bo'lsam ham, testdan o'ta olmadim.
Garchi qiyin bo'lsa ham, biz undan zavq oldik.
Garchi boy bo'lsa ham, u baxtli emas.

words.definition: On the condition that.
words.definitionUz: Shart bilan.
words.example1: You can borrow my car provided that you drive carefully.
words.example1Translation: Agar ehtiyotkorlik bilan haydasangiz, mashinamni olishingiz mumkin.
words.example2: I will help you provided that you help me too.
words.example2Translation: Agar siz ham menga yordam bersangiz, men sizga yordam beraman.
words.example3: We will go on a picnic provided that the weather is good.
words.example3Translation: Agar ob-havo yaxshi bo'lsa, biz piknikka boramiz.
extraExamples: You can join provided that you bring your own food.
Provided that you study hard, you will succeed.
I will come provided that I finish my work on time.
The trip is possible provided that we have enough money.
extraExampleTranslations: O'z ovqatingizni olib kelsangiz, qo'shilishingiz mumkin.
Agar pulimiz yetarli bo'lsa, sayohat mumkin.

words.definition: Used to show two possibilities.
words.definitionUz: Ikkita imkoniyatni ko'rsatish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I don't know whether she will come or not.
words.example2: Whether you like it or not, you must do it.
words.example2Translation: Yoqtirasizmi yoki yo'qmi, buni qilishingiz kerak.
words.example3: The question is whether we should wait or go now.
words.example3Translation: Savol shuki, kutishimiz kerakmi yoki hozir ketishimiz kerakmi.
extraExamples: I am not sure whether it will rain.
Whether we win or lose, we will try our best.
Tell me whether you agree or disagree.
She asked whether I was coming.
extraExampleTranslations: G'olib chiqamizmi yoki yutqazamizmi, bor kuchimizni beramiz.

words.definition: Except for; in addition to.
words.definitionUz: Apart from — biror narsadan tashqari yoki qo‘shimcha ravishda degani.
words.example1: Apart from English, she speaks French.
words.example1Translation: Ingliz tilidan tashqari u fransuz tilini ham biladi.
words.example2: The room was empty apart from a chair.
words.example2Translation: Xona bo‘sh edi, faqat bitta stul bor edi.
words.example3: Apart from the rain, the trip was great.
extraExamples: Apart from studying, he works part-time.
Everything is fine apart from one small problem.
Apart from you, everyone is coming.
The book is good apart from the ending.
Apart from pizza, I like pasta.
She knows all subjects apart from math.
Apart from the cost, it is perfect.
extraExampleTranslations: O‘qishdan tashqari u yarim kunlik ishlaydi.
Hamma narsa yaxshi, faqat bitta kichik muammo bor.
Pitsadan tashqari pastani ham yaxshi ko‘raman.
U matematikadan tashqari barcha fanlarni biladi.

words.definition: About or concerning something.
words.definitionUz: Regarding — biror narsa haqida yoki unga oid.
words.example1: I wrote to you regarding the meeting.
words.example1Translation: Men sizga uchrashuv bo‘yicha xat yozdim.
words.example2: Regarding your question, here is the answer.
words.example3: We need to talk regarding the project.
extraExamples: Regarding the payment, it has been made.
She asked questions regarding the rules.
Regarding your application, it was approved.
We received a letter regarding the issue.
He gave advice regarding career choices.
Regarding the date, we can change it.
extraExampleTranslations: U karyera tanlovi haqida maslahat berdi.

words.definition: About or relating to something.
words.definitionUz: Concerning — biror narsa haqida yoki unga tegishli.
words.example1: I have some questions concerning the contract.
words.example2: Concerning your email, I have replied.
words.example3: There is a problem concerning the schedule.
extraExamples: Concerning the trip, everything is ready.
She wrote a report concerning the issue.
Concerning safety, we must be careful.
I am calling concerning your order.
Concerning the meeting, it is postponed.
He has doubts concerning the plan.
Concerning the price, it is negotiable.

words.definition: As stated by or in agreement with something.
words.definitionUz: According to — biror narsaga asosan yoki unga muvofiq.
words.example1: According to the weather report, it will rain.
words.example2: According to the teacher, we did well.
words.example3: According to the rules, we cannot enter.
extraExamples: According to the plan, we start tomorrow.
According to her, everything is fine.
According to the law, it is not allowed.
According to the map, we are here.
According to the doctor, I need rest.
According to the schedule, the train is late.
According to the results, we won.
extraExampleTranslations: Shifokorga ko‘ra, menga dam olish kerak.

words.definition: Used to give an example.
words.definitionUz: For instance — misol keltirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I like fruits, for instance apples and bananas.
words.example1Translation: Menga mevalar yoqadi, masalan olma va banan.
words.example2: Many animals are fast, for instance cheetahs.
words.example3: She speaks languages, for instance Spanish and French.
words.example3Translation: U tillarni biladi, masalan ispan va fransuz.
extraExamples: There are many problems, for instance traffic.
He enjoys sports, for instance football.
For instance, let’s take this example.
Many students are absent, for instance John.
I need tools, for instance a hammer.
She likes reading, for instance novels.
For instance, this is how it works.
extraExampleTranslations: Ko‘p muammolar bor, masalan yo‘l tiqilinchlari.
U sportni yaxshi ko‘radi, masalan futbolni.
U o‘qishni yaxshi ko‘radi, masalan romanlarni.

words.definition: Used to show that the opposite is true.
words.definitionUz: On the contrary — teskari fikrni bildirish uchun ishlatiladi.
words.example1: I thought it was expensive. On the contrary, it was cheap.
words.example1Translation: Men uni qimmat deb o‘ylagandim. Aksincha, arzon edi.
words.example2: He is not lazy. On the contrary, he works very hard.
words.example2Translation: U yalqov emas. Aksincha, juda qattiq ishlaydi.
words.example3: The weather is not bad. On the contrary, it is perfect.
extraExamples: She is not quiet. On the contrary, she is very talkative.
It is not difficult. On the contrary, it is easy.
On the contrary, I agree with you.
He is not sad. On the contrary, he is happy.
The book is not boring. On the contrary, it is exciting.
On the contrary, we should go now.
It is not small. On the contrary, it is quite big.
extraExampleTranslations: U jim emas. Aksincha, juda gapdon.
Bu kichik emas. Aksincha, ancha katta.

words.definition: As a result of something.
words.definitionUz: As a consequence — biror narsaning natijasida.
words.example1: He studied hard. As a consequence, he passed the exam.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq o‘qidi. Natijada imtihondan o‘tdi.
words.example2: It rained heavily. As a consequence, the match was cancelled.
words.example2Translation: Kuchli yomg‘ir yog‘di. Natijada o‘yin bekor qilindi.
words.example3: She arrived late. As a consequence, she missed the train.
words.example3Translation: U kechikib keldi. Natijada poezdni o‘tkazib yubordi.
extraExamples: He didn't prepare. As a consequence, he failed.
We saved money. As a consequence, we bought a car.
The price increased. As a consequence, sales dropped.
She exercised daily. As a consequence, she became fit.
The factory closed. As a consequence, many lost jobs.
He helped others. As a consequence, he gained respect.
The team trained hard. As a consequence, they won.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz pul tejadik. Natijada mashina sotib oldik.
U har kuni sport bilan shug‘ullandi. Natijada sog‘lom bo‘ldi.
Zavod yopildi. Natijada ko‘p odamlar ishsiz qoldi.
U boshqalarga yordam berdi. Natijada hurmatga sazovor bo‘ldi.
Jamoa qattiq mashq qildi. Natijada g‘alaba qozondi.

words.definition: In spite of what has just been said.
words.definitionUz: Nevertheless — oldin aytib o‘tilganiga qaramay.
words.example1: It was raining. Nevertheless, we went out.
words.example1Translation: Yomg‘ir yog‘ayotgan edi. Shunga qaramay, biz tashqariga chiqdik.
words.example2: He is tired. Nevertheless, he finished the work.
words.example2Translation: U charchagan. Shunga qaramay, ishni tugatdi.
words.example3: The price is high. Nevertheless, I will buy it.
words.example3Translation: Narx yuqori. Shunga qaramay, uni sotib olaman.
extraExamples: She is young. Nevertheless, she is very wise.
It was difficult. Nevertheless, we succeeded.
He failed once. Nevertheless, he tried again.
The team is small. Nevertheless, they played well.
Nevertheless, I think it is a good idea.
It was expensive. Nevertheless, it was worth it.
She is busy. Nevertheless, she helped me.
extraExampleTranslations: U yosh. Shunga qaramay, juda dono.
Bu qiyin edi. Shunga qaramay, muvaffaqiyatga erishdik.
U bir marta muvaffaqiyatsiz bo‘ldi. Shunga qaramay, yana urinib ko‘rdi.
Jamoa kichik. Shunga qaramay, yaxshi o‘ynashdi.
Shunga qaramay, men buni yaxshi fikr deb o‘ylayman.
Bu qimmat edi. Shunga qaramay, arzigulik edi.
U band. Shunga qaramay, menga yordam berdi.

words.definition: In spite of that; nevertheless.
words.definitionUz: Nonetheless — shunga qaramay.
words.example1: It was cold. Nonetheless, we enjoyed the trip.
words.example1Translation: Sovuq edi. Shunga qaramay, sayohatdan zavq oldik.
words.example2: He is busy. Nonetheless, he called me.
words.example2Translation: U band. Shunga qaramay, menga qo‘ng‘iroq qildi.
words.example3: The book is long. Nonetheless, it is interesting.
extraExamples: She failed. Nonetheless, she didn't give up.
It is expensive. Nonetheless, I will buy it.
He is young. Nonetheless, he is very talented.
The weather was bad. Nonetheless, the event continued.
She was tired. Nonetheless, she helped.
It was difficult. Nonetheless, we finished it.
extraExampleTranslations: U muvaffaqiyatsiz bo‘ldi. Shunga qaramay, taslim bo‘lmadi.
Bu qimmat. Shunga qaramay, sotib olaman.
U yosh. Shunga qaramay, juda iste’dodli.
Ob-havo yomon edi. Shunga qaramay, tadbir davom etdi.
Shunga qaramay, men siz bilan roziman.
U charchagan edi. Shunga qaramay, yordam berdi.
Bu qiyin edi. Shunga qaramay, tugatdik.

words.definition: For this reason; therefore.
words.definitionUz: Hence — shu sababli, natijada.
words.example1: He was late, hence he missed the train.
words.example1Translation: U kechikdi, shu sababli poezdni o‘tkazib yubordi.
words.example2: She studied hard, hence she passed.
words.example2Translation: U qattiq o‘qidi, shu sababli o‘tdi.
words.example3: It is raining, hence we stay home.
words.example3Translation: Yomg‘ir yog‘moqda, shu sababli uyda qolamiz.
extraExamples: The road is closed, hence we take another route.
He is ill, hence he cannot come.
She practiced daily, hence she improved.
It is expensive, hence we cannot afford it.
The team trained well, hence they won.
Hence, we decided to cancel the meeting.
extraExampleTranslations: Yo‘l yopiq, shu sababli boshqa yo‘ldan boramiz.
U kasal, shu sababli kela olmaydi.
Narxlar oshdi, shu sababli savdo pasaydi.
U har kuni mashq qildi, shu sababli yaxshilandi.
Bu qimmat, shu sababli biz qodir emasmiz.
Jamoa yaxshi tayyorlandi, shu sababli g‘alaba qozondi.
Shu sababli, biz uchrashuvni bekor qilishga qaror qildik.

words.definition: By that means; as a result of that.
words.definitionUz: Thereby — shu yo‘l bilan yoki natijasida.
words.example1: She studied hard, thereby passing the exam.
words.example1Translation: U qattiq o‘qidi, shu orqali imtihondan o‘tdi.
words.example2: He saved money, thereby buying a new car.
words.example2Translation: U pul tejadi, shu orqali yangi mashina sotib oldi.
words.example3: They worked together, thereby finishing early.
words.example3Translation: Ular birga ishlashdi, shu orqali erta tugatishdi.
extraExamples: The team trained daily, thereby improving.
She helped others, thereby gaining respect.
He learned English, thereby getting a better job.
We reduced costs, thereby increasing profit.
She practiced speaking, thereby becoming fluent.
They followed the rules, thereby avoiding trouble.
He invested wisely, thereby becoming rich.
extraExampleTranslations: Jamoa har kuni mashq qildi, shu orqali yaxshilandi.
U boshqalarga yordam berdi, shu orqali hurmatga sazovor bo‘ldi.
U ingliz tilini o‘rgandi, shu orqali yaxshiroq ish topdi.
Biz xarajatlarni kamaytirdik, shu orqali foydani oshirdik.
U gapirishni mashq qildi, shu orqali ravon bo‘ldi.
Ular qoidalarga rioya qilishdi, shu orqali muammolardan qochishdi.
U aqlli sarmoya qildi, shu orqali boyib ketdi.

words.definition: The state of something or a requirement.
words.definitionUz: Condition — biror narsaning holati yoki talab qilinadigan shart.
words.example1: The car is in good condition.
words.example2Translation: Siz barcha shartlarga javob berishingiz kerak.
extraExamples: The house needs repair in some conditions.
Under no condition should you leave.
The weather condition is bad today.
Living conditions in the city are crowded.
extraExampleTranslations: Uy ba’zi joylarda ta’mir talab qiladi.

words.definition: Something that influences a situation.
words.definitionUz: Factor — biror holatga ta’sir qiluvchi omil.
words.example1: Price is an important factor.
words.example3: Weather is a key factor in farming.
extraExamples: The main factor is hard work.
Several factors contributed to the result.
Age is not the only factor.
extraExampleTranslations: Bir necha omil natijaga hissa qo‘shdi.

words.definition: One part or feature of something.
words.definitionUz: Aspect — biror narsaning bir tomoni yoki jihati.
words.example1: We discussed every aspect of the plan.
words.example1Translation: Biz rejani har jihatdan muhokama qildik.
extraExamples: One positive aspect is the location.
We need to consider all aspects.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz barcha jihatlarni hisobga olishimiz kerak.

words.definition: A distinctive part or characteristic.
words.definitionUz: Feature — biror narsaning o‘ziga xos xususiyati.
words.example1: The phone has many new features.
words.example2: Safety is a key feature of the car.
words.example3: The main feature of the house is the garden.
extraExamples: This app has a useful feature.
One special feature is the color.
The product has many attractive features.
New features will be added soon.
The camera has a special feature.

words.definition: A series of actions to achieve a result.
words.definitionUz: Process — natijaga erishish uchun amalga oshiriladigan ketma-ket harakatlar.
words.example1: The application process is simple.
extraExamples: We are in the planning process.
This is part of the decision-making process.
extraExampleTranslations: Ishga olish jarayoni vaqt talab qiladi.
Bu qaror qabul qilish jarayonining bir qismi.

words.definition: A way of dealing with something.
words.definitionUz: Approach — biror narsaga yondashish usuli.
words.example1: We need a new approach to the problem.
words.example3: The teacher uses a friendly approach.
extraExamples: He has a positive approach to life.

words.definition: An idea or principle.
words.definitionUz: Concept — g‘oya yoki asosiy tushuncha.
words.example1: The concept is simple.
extraExamples: The concept of time is interesting.
The concept is difficult to explain.
She likes the concept of the app.

words.definition: A subject or situation that needs attention.
words.definitionUz: Matter — e’tibor talab qiladigan mavzu yoki holat.
words.example1: This is an important matter.
words.example2: We need to discuss the matter.
extraExamples: She raised the matter in the meeting.
It is a matter of time.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu masala darhol e’tibor talab qiladi.

words.definition: Information that proves something.
words.definitionUz: Evidence — biror narsani isbotlovchi ma’lumot yoki dalil.
words.example1: There is no evidence of the crime.
words.example2: The evidence shows that he is innocent.
extraExamples: There is clear evidence of success.

words.definition: A change that happens because of something.
words.definitionUz: Effect — biror narsaning natijasida yuzaga keladigan o‘zgarish.
words.example1: The medicine has a good effect.
words.example2: Pollution has a bad effect on health.
words.example3: The effect of the training was positive.
extraExamples: Climate change has a global effect.
The movie had a strong emotional effect.
We studied the cause and effect.
The new law will have a big effect.
Her words had a powerful effect.

words.definition: The chance that something may happen.
words.definitionUz: Possibility — biror narsaning sodir bo‘lishi mumkinligi.
words.example1: There is a possibility of rain tomorrow.
words.example3: There is no possibility of changing the date.
words.example3Translation: Sanani o‘zgartirishning hech qanday imkoni yo‘q.
extraExamples: She discussed the possibility of moving.
We must prepare for every possibility.
There is a possibility that he will come.
extraExampleTranslations: U ko‘chib o‘tish ehtimolini muhokama qildi.
Biz har bir ehtimolga tayyor bo‘lishimiz kerak.

words.definition: The likelihood that something will happen.
words.definitionUz: Probability — biror narsaning sodir bo‘lish ehtimolligi.
words.example1: The probability of success is high.
words.example2: There is a low probability of rain.
extraExamples: High probability means it is likely.
What is the probability of winning?
The probability of error is small.
The probability increased after the change.
extraExampleTranslations: Yuqori ehtimollik sodir bo‘lish ehtimolini bildiradi.

words.definition: A choice or alternative.
words.definitionUz: Option — tanlov yoki muqobil variant.
words.example1: We have two options.
extraExamples: There are many options to choose from.
We need to explore other options.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz boshqa variantlarni ham ko‘rib chiqishimiz kerak.

words.definition: A greater liking for one thing over another.
words.definitionUz: Preference — bir narsani ikkinchisidan ko‘ra yaxshi ko‘rish.
words.example1: My preference is tea.
words.example2: She has a preference for bright colors.
extraExamples: Preference is given to experienced applicants.
I have a preference for window seats.
extraExampleTranslations: Uning afzalligi vaqt o‘tishi bilan o‘zgardi.

words.definition: All people born and living at about the same time.
words.definitionUz: Generation — taxminan bir vaqtda tug‘ilib yashayotgan odamlar.
words.example1: The younger generation uses technology well.
words.example2: This song is popular with my generation.
words.example2Translation: Bu qo‘shiq mening avlodim orasida mashhur.
words.example3: Each generation has its own challenges.
words.example3Translation: Har bir avlodning o‘z qiyinchiliklari bor.
extraExamples: My parents belong to the older generation.
This is a problem for future generations.
The company targets the young generation.

words.definition: An effort to do something.
words.definitionUz: Attempt — biror ishni bajarishga qilingan harakat.
words.example1: This is my first attempt.
words.example2: The team made a successful attempt.
words.example3: He failed on his first attempt.
extraExamples: The attempt to climb the mountain failed.
extraExampleTranslations: U bir necha marta urinib ko‘rdi.
Har bir urinish bizga saboq beradi.

words.definition: The process of sharing information.
words.definitionUz: Communication — ma’lumot almashish jarayoni.
words.example1: Good communication is important in teams.
words.example3: The lack of communication caused problems.

words.definition: A conversation about a topic.
words.definitionUz: Discussion — biror mavzu bo‘yicha suhbat yoki muhokama.
words.example1: We had a long discussion.
words.example3: Let’s have a discussion about the plan.
extraExamples: We need more discussion on this topic.
Group discussion is common in class.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu mavzu bo‘yicha ko‘proq muhokama kerak.

words.definition: An informal talk between people.
words.definitionUz: Conversation — odamlar o‘rtasidagi norasmiy suhbat.
words.example1: We had a nice conversation.
extraExamples: The conversation went on for hours.
He started a conversation with a stranger.
We need to have a serious conversation.
The conversation was about the weather.
She is good at starting conversations.
extraExampleTranslations: U notanish odam bilan suhbat boshladi.

words.definition: A decision or arrangement between people.
words.definitionUz: Agreement — odamlar o‘rtasidagi kelishuv yoki qaror.
words.example1: We reached an agreement.
words.example3: There is no agreement on the price.
extraExamples: The two sides made an agreement.
We have an agreement to meet weekly.
The agreement is valid for one year.
extraExampleTranslations: Biz haftada bir marta uchrashish bo‘yicha kelishdik.

words.definition: A difference of opinion.
words.definitionUz: Disagreement — fikrlar farqi.
words.example1: There was a disagreement about the plan.
extraExamples: Disagreement can lead to better solutions.
There is disagreement among the team.
They found a way to end the disagreement.
extraExampleTranslations: Kelishmovchilik yaxshiroq yechimlarga olib kelishi mumkin.
U o‘z kelishmovchiligini muloyimlik bilan bildirdi.
Kelishmovchilik bir necha kun davom etdi.

words.definition: A problem or something that is hard to do.
words.definitionUz: Difficulty — muammo yoki bajarish qiyin bo‘lgan narsa.
words.example1: She had difficulty learning English.
words.example1Translation: U ingliz tilini o‘rganishda qiyinchilik ko‘rdi.
extraExamples: She asked for help with the difficulty.
There is no difficulty in this task.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu vazifada hech qanday qiyinchilik yo‘q.

words.definition: The process of becoming better.
words.definitionUz: Improvement — yaxshiroq holatga o‘tish jarayoni.
words.example1: There is a big improvement in her English.
words.example1Translation: Uning ingliz tilida katta yaxshilanish bor.
extraExamples: The doctor noted improvement in health.
extraExampleTranslations: Yaxshilanish vaqt va kuch talab qiladi.

words.definition: Something you accept as true.
words.definitionUz: Belief — siz to‘g‘ri deb qabul qilgan narsa.
words.example1: She has strong religious beliefs.
words.example2: It is my belief that education is important.
words.example3Translation: Uning e’tiqodlari vaqt o‘tishi bilan o‘zgardi.
extraExamples: His belief in hard work is strong.
extraExampleTranslations: Bu e’tiqod unga muvaffaqiyatga erishishga yordam berdi.
Biz boshqa odamlarning e’tiqodlarini hurmat qilamiz.

words.definition: The circumstances or past of a person or thing.
words.definitionUz: Background — shaxs yoki narsaning o‘tmishi yoki sharoitlari.
words.example1: She has a strong academic background.
words.example1Translation: Uning kuchli akademik kelib chiqishi bor.
words.example2: The background of the photo is beautiful.
words.example3: We need to check his background.
words.example3Translation: Biz uning kelib chiqishini tekshirishimiz kerak.
extraExamples: The music has a nice background.
The company checks the background of applicants.
The story has an interesting background.
extraExampleTranslations: U o‘zining madaniy kelib chiqishini tushuntirdi.

words.definition: A small piece of information.
words.definitionUz: Detail — mayda ma’lumot yoki tafsilot.
words.example1: She explained every detail.
extraExamples: The plan is good in every detail.

words.definition: An event, especially an unusual one.
words.definitionUz: Incident — ayniqsa g‘ayrioddiy voqea.
words.example1: There was an incident at school.

words.definition: How good or bad something is.
words.definitionUz: Quality — biror narsaning yaxshi yoki yomonligi.
words.example1: The quality of the product is high.
words.example3: She always chooses quality over price.
words.example3Translation: U har doim narxdan ko‘ra sifatni tanlaydi.
extraExamples: Quality is more important than quantity.
This brand is known for quality.
The quality of education is improving.

words.definition: A set of connected things that work together.
words.definitionUz: System — bir-biriga bog‘langan va birgalikda ishlaydigan narsalar to‘plami.
words.example1: The education system is changing.
words.example3: We need a better transportation system.
extraExamples: She has a good filing system.
The health care system needs improvement.
The company uses a new payment system.
The nervous system controls the body.
We are updating the security system.
